mapper.select: SELECT RBA_ATTCH_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS SEQ FROM DUAL

SELECT A.VALT_YY , A.VALT_SDT , A.EDU_M_CD , A.EDU_METH_CD , A.EDU_TGT_CD , A.EDU_JKW_NO , A.EDU_BRNO_CD , (SELECT MAX(DEP_TITLE) FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = A.EDU_BRNO_CD) AS EDU_BRNO_NM , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.EDU_JKW_NO) AS EDU_JKW_NM , A.EDU_ISU_YN , A.ISU_DT , A.EDU_TIME , A.MI_ISU_CD , A.MI_ISU_NM FROM SRBA_TONGJE_EDU_D A WHERE A.VALT_YY = #{VALT_YY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_SDT = #{VALT_SDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.EDU_M_CD = #{EDU_M_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.EDU_METH_CD = #{EDU_METH_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.EDU_TGT_CD = #{EDU_TGT_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY A.VALT_YY, A.VALT_SDT, A.EDU_M_CD, A.EDU_METH_CD, A.EDU_TGT_CD, A.EDU_JKW_NO

SELECT A.BRNO_CD AS BRNO_CD , A.SEQ_NO AS SEQ_NO , B.DEP_TITLE AS BRNO_NM , A.ADT_SET_TYP_NM AS ADT_SET_TYP_NM , A.FGNR_YN AS FGNR_YN , A.ADT_SET_NM AS ADT_SET_NM , A.SET_DD AS SET_DD , A.ACTN_EXP_DT AS ACTN_EXP_DT , A.ACTN_CMPT_DT AS ACTN_CMPT_DT , A.ACTN_YN AS ACTN_YN , case NVL(C.ATTCH_FILE_NO,0) when 0 then 'N' else 'Y' end as ATTCH_FILE_YN , C.ATTCH_FILE_NO AS ATTCH_FILE_NO FROM SRBA_TONGJE_ADT_M A LEFT OUTER JOIN C_DEP_INFO B ON A.BRNO_CD = B.DEP_DESC LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ATTCH_FILE_NO, MAX(FILE_SER) AS FILE_SER FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE GROUP BY ATTCH_FILE_NO ) C ON A.ATTCH_FILE_NO = C.ATTCH_FILE_NO WHERE A.BRNO_CD LIKE CONCAT(#{BRNO_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') AND A.SET_DD BETWEEN #{stDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and #{edDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.ACTN_YN LIKE CONCAT(#{ACTN_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')

SELECT ATTCH_FILE_NO, FILE_SER, DATA_G, FILE_POS, LOSC_FILE_NM, PHSC_FILE_NM, FILE_SIZE, DOWNLOAD_CNT, DR_OP_JKW_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM, DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE WHERE ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NULL) AS CNT, T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER, T01.DATA_G, T01.FILE_POS, T01.LOSC_FILE_NM, T01.PHSC_FILE_NM, T01.FILE_SIZE, T01.DOWNLOAD_CNT, T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM, T01.DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE T01 JOIN SRBA_TONGJE_ADT_M T02 ON T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO = T02.ATTCH_FILE_NO WHERE T02.BRNO_CD = #{BRNO_CD,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.SET_DD = #{SET_DD,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.SEQ_NO = #{SEQ_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER
mapper.insert: DELETE FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE WHERE ATTCH_FILE_NO = NVL(#{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=NUMERIC},0)
mapper.select: SELECT A.BRNO_CD AS BRNO_CD , B.DEP_TITLE AS BRNO_NM , A.SET_DD AS SET_DD , A.SEQ_NO AS SEQ_NO , A.FGNR_YN AS FGNR_YN , A.ACTN_YN AS ACTN_YN , A.ACTN_EXP_DT AS ACTN_EXP_DT , A.ACTN_CMPT_DT AS ACTN_CMPT_DT , A.ADT_SET_TYP_NM AS ADT_SET_TYP_NM , A.ADT_SET_NM AS ADT_SET_NM , A.ADT_SET_CTNT AS ADT_SET_CTNT , A.ACTN_CTNT AS ACTN_CTNT , A.ATTCH_FILE_NO AS ATTCH_FILE_NO , A.DR_DT AS DR_DT , A.DR_TIME AS DR_TIME , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO AS DR_OP_JKW_NO , A.CHG_DT AS CHG_DT , A.CHG_TIME AS CHG_TIME , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM SRBA_TONGJE_ADT_M A LEFT OUTER JOIN C_DEP_INFO B ON A.BRNO_CD = B.DEP_DESC WHERE A.BRNO_CD = #{BRNO_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.SET_DD = #{SET_DD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.SEQ_NO = #{SEQ_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NULL) AS CNT, T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER, T01.DATA_G, T01.FILE_POS, T01.LOSC_FILE_NM, T01.PHSC_FILE_NM, T01.FILE_SIZE, T01.DOWNLOAD_CNT, T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM, T01.DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE T01 JOIN SRBA_TONGJE_ADT_M T02 ON T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO = T02.ATTCH_FILE_NO WHERE T02.BRNO_CD = #{BRNO_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.SET_DD = #{SET_DD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.SEQ_NO = #{SEQ_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NULL) AS CNT , X.ATTCH_FILE_NO , X.FILE_SER , X.DATA_G , X.FILE_POS , X.LOSC_FILE_NM , X.PHSC_FILE_NM , X.FILE_SIZE , X.DOWNLOAD_CNT , X.DR_OP_JKW_NO , X.REG_NM , X.DR_DT FROM ( SELECT T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER, T01.DATA_G, T01.FILE_POS, T01.LOSC_FILE_NM, T01.PHSC_FILE_NM, T01.FILE_SIZE, T01.DOWNLOAD_CNT, T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM, T01.DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE T01 JOIN SRBA_TONGJE_ADT_M T02 ON T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO = T02.ATTCH_FILE_NO WHERE T02.BRNO_CD = #{BRNO_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.SET_DD = #{SET_DD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.SEQ_NO = #{SEQ_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS ATTCH_FILE_NO, 0 AS FILE_SER, '' AS DATA_G, '' AS FILE_POS, '' AS LOSC_FILE_NM, '' AS PHSC_FILE_NM, 0 AS FILE_SIZE, 0 AS DOWNLOAD_CNT, '' AS DR_OP_JKW_NO, '' AS REG_NM, '' AS DR_DT FROM DUAL ) X ORDER BY X.ATTCH_FILE_NO, X.FILE_SER
mapper.insert: DELETE FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE WHERE ATTCH_FILE_NO = NVL(#{ATTCH_FILE_NO},0)
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(SEQ_NO),0)+1 AS SEQ_NO FROM SRBA_TONGJE_ADT_M
SELECT RBA_ATTCH_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS SEQ FROM DUAL
mapper.update: UPDATE SRBA_TONGJE_ADT_M SET ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE SEQ_NO = #{SEQ_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
DELETE FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE /* RBA_첨부파일 */ WHERE ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select: SELECT RBA_ATTCH_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS SEQ FROM DUAL

SELECT SUBSTR(A.VALT_DT, 1, 4) AS YYYY , A.VALT_DT AS VALT_DT , A.REPORT_YN AS REPORT_YN , CASE WHEN A.ETC_CTNT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 end AS YO_CTNT_YN , A.AGREE_DT AS AGREE_DT , NVL(B.USER_NM,'') AS AGREE_NM , A.JWN_ACTN_YN FROM SRBA_TONGJE_DAILY_R A LEFT OUTER JOIN C_USER B ON A.AGREE_NO = B.LOGIN_ID WHERE A.VALT_DT BETWEEN #{stDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and #{edDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.REPORT_YN like CONCAT(#{REPORT_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') AND CASE NVL(A.YO_CTNT,'') WHEN '' THEN 0 ELSE 1 end like CONCAT(#{YO_CTNT_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') ORDER BY A.VALT_DT DESC, A.AGREE_DT DESC

SELECT A.VALT_DT , SUBSTR(A.VALT_DT, 1, 4) AS VALT_YYYY , CONCAT('(', SUBSTR(A.VALT_DT, 3, 2), '년 ', SUBSTR(A.VALT_DT, 5, 2), '월 ', SUBSTR(A.VALT_DT, 7, 2), '일, ') AS VALT_DT_HEAD , A.REPORT_YN , A.JWN_ACTN_YN , A.AGREE_DT , A.AGREE_NO , A.GO_H_CNT1 , A.GO_H_CNT2 , A.GO_H_CNT3 , A.GO_H_CNT1 + A.GO_H_CNT2 + A.GO_H_CNT3 AS GO_H_CNT_G_SUM , A.GO_H_CNT4 , A.GO_H_CNT5 , A.GO_H_CNT6 , A.GO_H_CNT7 , A.GO_H_CNT8 , A.GO_H_CNT9 , A.GO_H_CNT10 , A.GO_H_CNT11 , A.GO_H_CNT12 , A.GO_H_CNT13 , A.GO_H_CNT14 , A.GO_H_CNT15 , A.GO_H_CNT16 , A.GO_H_CNT17 , A.GO_H_CNT4 + A.GO_H_CNT5 + A.GO_H_CNT6 + A.GO_H_CNT7 + A.GO_H_CNT8 + A.GO_H_CNT9 + A.GO_H_CNT10 + A.GO_H_CNT11 + A.GO_H_CNT12 + A.GO_H_CNT13 + A.GO_H_CNT14 + A.GO_H_CNT15 + A.GO_H_CNT16 + A.GO_H_CNT17 AS GO_H_CNT_B_SUM , A.GO_H_CNT1 + A.GO_H_CNT2 + A.GO_H_CNT3 + A.GO_H_CNT4 + A.GO_H_CNT5 + A.GO_H_CNT6 + A.GO_H_CNT7 + A.GO_H_CNT8 + A.GO_H_CNT9 + A.GO_H_CNT10 + A.GO_H_CNT11 + A.GO_H_CNT12 + A.GO_H_CNT13 + A.GO_H_CNT14 + A.GO_H_CNT15 + A.GO_H_CNT16 + A.GO_H_CNT17 AS GO_H_CNT_TOT , A.GO_L_CNT1 , A.GO_L_CNT2 , A.GO_L_CNT3 , A.GO_L_CNT1 + A.GO_L_CNT2 + A.GO_L_CNT3 AS GO_L_CNT_G_SUM , A.GO_L_CNT4 , A.GO_L_CNT5 , A.GO_L_CNT6 , A.GO_L_CNT7 , A.GO_L_CNT8 , A.GO_L_CNT9 , A.GO_L_CNT10 , A.GO_L_CNT11 , A.GO_L_CNT12 , A.GO_L_CNT13 , A.GO_L_CNT14 , A.GO_L_CNT15 , A.GO_L_CNT16 , A.GO_L_CNT17 , A.GO_L_CNT4 + A.GO_L_CNT5 + A.GO_L_CNT6 + A.GO_L_CNT7 + A.GO_L_CNT8 + A.GO_L_CNT9 + A.GO_L_CNT10 + A.GO_L_CNT11 + A.GO_L_CNT12 + A.GO_L_CNT13 + A.GO_L_CNT14 + A.GO_L_CNT15 + A.GO_L_CNT16 + A.GO_L_CNT17 AS GO_L_CNT_B_SUM , A.GO_L_CNT1 + A.GO_L_CNT2 + A.GO_L_CNT3 + A.GO_L_CNT4 + A.GO_L_CNT5 + A.GO_L_CNT6 + A.GO_L_CNT7 + A.GO_L_CNT8 + A.GO_L_CNT9 + A.GO_L_CNT10 + A.GO_L_CNT11 + A.GO_L_CNT12 + A.GO_L_CNT13 + A.GO_L_CNT14 + A.GO_L_CNT15 + A.GO_L_CNT16 + A.GO_L_CNT17 AS GO_L_CNT_TOT
, A.GO_R_CNT1 , A.GO_R_CNT2 , A.GO_R_CNT3 , A.GO_R_CNT1 + A.GO_R_CNT2 + A.GO_R_CNT3 AS GO_R_CNT_G_SUM , A.GO_R_CNT4 , A.GO_R_CNT5 , A.GO_R_CNT6 , A.GO_R_CNT7 , A.GO_R_CNT8 , A.GO_R_CNT9 , A.GO_R_CNT10 , A.GO_R_CNT11 , A.GO_R_CNT12 , A.GO_R_CNT13 , A.GO_R_CNT14 , A.GO_R_CNT15 , A.GO_R_CNT16 , A.GO_R_CNT17 , A.GO_R_CNT4 + A.GO_R_CNT5 + A.GO_R_CNT6 + A.GO_R_CNT7 + A.GO_R_CNT8 + A.GO_R_CNT9 + A.GO_R_CNT10 + A.GO_R_CNT11 + A.GO_R_CNT12 + A.GO_R_CNT13 + A.GO_R_CNT14 + A.GO_R_CNT15 + A.GO_R_CNT16 + A.GO_R_CNT17 AS GO_R_CNT_B_SUM , A.GO_R_CNT1 + A.GO_R_CNT2 + A.GO_R_CNT3 + A.GO_R_CNT4 + A.GO_R_CNT5 + A.GO_R_CNT6 + A.GO_R_CNT7 + A.GO_R_CNT8 + A.GO_R_CNT9 + A.GO_R_CNT10 + A.GO_R_CNT11 + A.GO_R_CNT12 + A.GO_R_CNT13 + A.GO_R_CNT14 + A.GO_R_CNT15 + A.GO_R_CNT16 + A.GO_R_CNT17 AS GO_R_CNT_TOT
, NVL(B.GO_H_CNT1,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT1 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT2,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT2 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT3,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT3 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT1,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT2,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT3,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT_G_SUM , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT4,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT4 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT5,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT5 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT6,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT6 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT7,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT7 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT8,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT8 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT9,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT9 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT10,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT10 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT11,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT11 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT12,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT12 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT13,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT13 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT14,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT14 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT15,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT15 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT16,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT16 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT17,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT17 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT4,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT5,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT6,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT7,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT8,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT9,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT10,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT11,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT12,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT13,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT14,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT15,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT16,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT17,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT_B_SUM , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT1,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT2,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT3,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT4,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT5,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT6,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT7,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT8,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT9,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT10,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT11,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT12,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT13,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT14,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT15,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT16,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT17,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT_TOT
, NVL(B.GO_L_CNT1,0) AS b_GO_L_CNT1 , NVL(B.GO_L_CNT2,0) AS b_GO_L_CNT2 , NVL(B.GO_L_CNT3,0) AS b_GO_L_CNT3 , NVL(B.GO_L_CNT1,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT2,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT3,0) AS b_GO_L_CNT_G_SUM , NVL(B.GO_L_CNT4,0) AS b_GO_L_CNT4 , NVL(B.GO_L_CNT5,0) AS b_GO_L_CNT5 , NVL(B.GO_L_CNT6,0) AS b_GO_L_CNT6 , NVL(B.GO_L_CNT7,0) AS b_GO_L_CNT7 , NVL(B.GO_L_CNT8,0) AS b_GO_L_CNT8 , NVL(B.GO_L_CNT9,0) AS b_GO_L_CNT9 , NVL(B.GO_L_CNT10,0) AS b_GO_L_CNT10 , NVL(B.GO_L_CNT11,0) AS b_GO_L_CNT11 , NVL(B.GO_L_CNT12,0) AS b_GO_L_CNT12 , NVL(B.GO_L_CNT13,0) AS b_GO_L_CNT13 , NVL(B.GO_L_CNT14,0) AS b_GO_L_CNT14 , NVL(B.GO_L_CNT15,0) AS b_GO_L_CNT15 , NVL(B.GO_L_CNT16,0) AS b_GO_L_CNT16 , NVL(B.GO_L_CNT17,0) AS b_GO_L_CNT17 , NVL(B.GO_L_CNT4,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT5,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT6,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT7,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT8,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT9,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT10,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT11,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT12,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT13,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT14,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT15,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT16,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT17,0) AS b_GO_L_CNT_B_SUM , NVL(B.GO_L_CNT1,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT2,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT3,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT4,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT5,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT6,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT7,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT8,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT9,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT10,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT11,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT12,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT13,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT14,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT15,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT16,0) + NVL(B.GO_L_CNT17,0) AS b_GO_L_CNT_TOT
, A.GO_H_CNT1 + A.GO_L_CNT1 + A.GO_R_CNT1 AS TOT_GO_CNT1 , A.GO_H_CNT2 + A.GO_L_CNT2 + A.GO_R_CNT2 AS TOT_GO_CNT2 , A.GO_H_CNT3 + A.GO_L_CNT3 + A.GO_R_CNT3 AS TOT_GO_CNT3 , A.GO_H_CNT4 + A.GO_L_CNT4 + A.GO_R_CNT4 AS TOT_GO_CNT4 , A.GO_H_CNT5 + A.GO_L_CNT5 + A.GO_R_CNT5 AS TOT_GO_CNT5 , A.GO_H_CNT6 + A.GO_L_CNT6 + A.GO_R_CNT6 AS TOT_GO_CNT6 , A.GO_H_CNT7 + A.GO_L_CNT7 + A.GO_R_CNT7 AS TOT_GO_CNT7 , A.GO_H_CNT8 + A.GO_L_CNT8 + A.GO_R_CNT8 AS TOT_GO_CNT8 , A.GO_H_CNT9 + A.GO_L_CNT9 + A.GO_R_CNT9 AS TOT_GO_CNT9 , A.GO_H_CNT10 + A.GO_L_CNT10 + A.GO_R_CNT10 AS TOT_GO_CNT10 , A.GO_H_CNT11 + A.GO_L_CNT11 + A.GO_R_CNT11 AS TOT_GO_CNT11 , A.GO_H_CNT12 + A.GO_L_CNT12 + A.GO_R_CNT12 AS TOT_GO_CNT12 , A.GO_H_CNT13 + A.GO_L_CNT13 + A.GO_R_CNT13 AS TOT_GO_CNT13 , A.GO_H_CNT14 + A.GO_L_CNT14 + A.GO_R_CNT14 AS TOT_GO_CNT14 , A.GO_H_CNT15 + A.GO_L_CNT15 + A.GO_R_CNT15 AS TOT_GO_CNT15 , A.GO_H_CNT16 + A.GO_L_CNT16 + A.GO_R_CNT16 AS TOT_GO_CNT16 , A.GO_H_CNT17 + A.GO_L_CNT17 + A.GO_R_CNT17 AS TOT_GO_CNT17 , A.GO_H_CNT1 + A.GO_L_CNT1 + A.GO_R_CNT1 + A.GO_H_CNT2 + A.GO_L_CNT2 + A.GO_R_CNT2 + A.GO_H_CNT3 + A.GO_L_CNT3 + A.GO_R_CNT3 AS TOT_GO_CNT_G_SUM , A.GO_H_CNT4 + A.GO_L_CNT4 + A.GO_R_CNT4+ A.GO_H_CNT5 + A.GO_L_CNT5 + A.GO_R_CNT5+ A.GO_H_CNT6 + A.GO_L_CNT6 + A.GO_R_CNT6+ A.GO_H_CNT7 + A.GO_L_CNT7 + A.GO_R_CNT7+ A.GO_H_CNT8 + A.GO_L_CNT8 + A.GO_R_CNT8+ A.GO_H_CNT9 + A.GO_L_CNT9 + A.GO_R_CNT9+ A.GO_H_CNT10 + A.GO_L_CNT10 + A.GO_R_CNT10+ A.GO_H_CNT11 + A.GO_L_CNT11 + A.GO_R_CNT11+ A.GO_H_CNT12 + A.GO_L_CNT12 + A.GO_R_CNT12+ A.GO_H_CNT13 + A.GO_L_CNT13 + A.GO_R_CNT13 + A.GO_H_CNT14 + A.GO_L_CNT14 + A.GO_R_CNT14 + A.GO_H_CNT15 + A.GO_L_CNT15 + A.GO_R_CNT15 + A.GO_H_CNT16 + A.GO_L_CNT16 + A.GO_R_CNT16 + A.GO_H_CNT17 + A.GO_L_CNT17 + A.GO_R_CNT17 AS TOT_GO_CNT_B_SUM , A.GO_H_CNT1 + A.GO_L_CNT1 + A.GO_R_CNT1 + A.GO_H_CNT2 + A.GO_L_CNT2 + A.GO_R_CNT2 + A.GO_H_CNT3 + A.GO_L_CNT3 + A.GO_R_CNT3 + A.GO_H_CNT4 + A.GO_L_CNT4 + A.GO_R_CNT4+ A.GO_H_CNT5 + A.GO_L_CNT5 + A.GO_R_CNT5+ A.GO_H_CNT6 + A.GO_L_CNT6 + A.GO_R_CNT6+ A.GO_H_CNT7 + A.GO_L_CNT7 + A.GO_R_CNT7+ A.GO_H_CNT8 + A.GO_L_CNT8 + A.GO_R_CNT8+ A.GO_H_CNT9 + A.GO_L_CNT9 + A.GO_R_CNT9+ A.GO_H_CNT10 + A.GO_L_CNT10 + A.GO_R_CNT10+ A.GO_H_CNT11 + A.GO_L_CNT11 + A.GO_R_CNT11+ A.GO_H_CNT12 + A.GO_L_CNT12 + A.GO_R_CNT12+ A.GO_H_CNT13 + A.GO_L_CNT13 + A.GO_R_CNT13 + A.GO_H_CNT14 + A.GO_L_CNT14 + A.GO_R_CNT14 + A.GO_H_CNT15 + A.GO_L_CNT15 + A.GO_R_CNT15 + A.GO_H_CNT16 + A.GO_L_CNT16 + A.GO_R_CNT16 + A.GO_H_CNT17 + A.GO_L_CNT17 + A.GO_R_CNT17 AS TOT_GO_CNT_TOT
, A.JU_CNT1 , A.JU_CNT2 , A.JU_CNT3 , A.JU_CNT4 , A.JU_CNT5 , A.JU_CNT6 , A.JU_CNT7 , A.JU_CNT1 + A.JU_CNT2 + A.JU_CNT3 + A.JU_CNT4 + A.JU_CNT5 + A.JU_CNT6 + A.JU_CNT7 AS JU_CNT_TOT
, A.YO_CNT1 , A.YO_CNT2 , A.YO_CNT3 , A.YO_CNT4 , A.YO_CNT5 , A.YO_CNT6 , A.YO_CNT2 + A.YO_CNT3 + A.YO_CNT4 + A.YO_CNT5 + A.YO_CNT6 AS YO_CNT_TOT
, NVL(B.YO_CNT1,0) AS B_YO_CNT1
, A.STR_CNT1 , A.STR_CNT2 , A.STR_CNT3 , A.STR_CNT4 , A.STR_CNT5 , A.STR_CNT6 , A.STR_CNT7
, NVL(B.STR_CNT7,0) AS B_STR_CNT7
, A.CTR_CNT1 , A.CTR_CNT2 , A.CTR_CNT3 , A.CTR_CNT4 , A.CTR_CNT5 , A.CTR_CNT6
, NVL(B.CTR_CNT6,0) AS B_CTR_CNT6
, A.YO_CTNT , A.ETC_CTNT
, A.DR_DT , A.DR_TIME , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO , A.CHG_DT , A.CHG_TIME , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM (SELECT * FROM SRBA_TONGJE_DAILY_R WHERE VALT_DT = #{VALT_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM SRBA_TONGJE_DAILY_R WHERE VALT_DT = DATE_FORMAT(TIMESTAMPADD(DAY, -1, #{VALT_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), '%Y%m%d')) B ON 1=1

SELECT VALT_YYMM AS CODE, CONCAT(SUBSTR(VALT_YYMM, 1, 4), '년 ', SUBSTR(VALT_YYMM, 5, 2), '월') AS NAME FROM SRBA_TONGJE_MONTHLY_R WHERE VALT_YYMM BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(TIMESTAMPADD(MONTH, -36, NOW()), '%Y%m%d') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY VALT_YYMM DESC

SELECT VALT_YYMM AS CODE, CONCAT(SUBSTR(VALT_YYMM, 1, 4), '년 ', SUBSTR(VALT_YYMM, 5, 2), '월') AS NAME FROM SRBA_TONGJE_MONTHLY_R WHERE VALT_YYMM BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(TIMESTAMPADD(MONTH, -36, NOW()), '%Y%m%d') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY VALT_YYMM

SELECT SUBSTR(A.VALT_YYMM, 1, 4) AS YYYY , A.VALT_YYMM AS VALT_YYMM , CONCAT(SUBSTR(A.VALT_YYMM, 1, 4), '년 ', SUBSTR(A.VALT_YYMM, 5, 6), '월') AS VALT_YYMM_NM , A.REPORT_YN AS REPORT_YN , A.AGREE_DT AS AGREE_DT , NVL(B.USER_NM,'') AS AGREE_NM , A.JWN_ACTN_YN FROM SRBA_TONGJE_MONTHLY_R A LEFT OUTER JOIN C_USER B ON A.AGREE_NO = B.LOGIN_ID WHERE A.VALT_YYMM BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{stDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},1,6) and SUBSTR(#{edDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},1,6) AND A.REPORT_YN like CONCAT(#{REPORT_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') ORDER BY A.VALT_YYMM DESC, A.AGREE_DT DESC

SELECT A.VALT_YYMM , SUBSTR(A.VALT_YYMM, 1, 4) AS VALT_YYYY , CONCAT( '(', SUBSTR(A.VALT_YYMM, 3, 2), '년 ', SUBSTR(A.VALT_YYMM, 5, 2), '월 , ' ) AS VALT_DT_HEAD , CONCAT( '(', SUBSTR(A.VALT_YYMM, 3, 2), '년 ', SUBSTR(A.VALT_YYMM, 5, 2),| '월 01일 ~ ', SUBSTR(A.VALT_YYMM, 3, 2), '년 ', SUBSTR(A.VALT_YYMM, 5, 2), '월 ', SUBSTR(DATE_FORMAT(TIMESTAMPADD(DAY, -1, TIMESTAMPADD(MONTH, 1, CONCAT(A.VALT_YYMM, '01'))), '%Y%m%d'), 7,2), '일 , ') AS VALT_DT_END
, A.REPORT_YN , A.JWN_ACTN_YN , A.AGREE_DT , A.AGREE_NO , A.PC_YN

, A.GO_R_CNT1 , A.GO_R_CNT2 , A.GO_R_CNT3 , A.GO_R_CNT1 + A.GO_R_CNT2 + A.GO_R_CNT3 AS GO_R_CNT_G_SUM , A.GO_R_CNT4 , A.GO_R_CNT5 , A.GO_R_CNT6 , A.GO_R_CNT7 , A.GO_R_CNT8 , A.GO_R_CNT9 , A.GO_R_CNT10 , A.GO_R_CNT11 , A.GO_R_CNT12 , A.GO_R_CNT13 , A.GO_R_CNT14 , A.GO_R_CNT15 , A.GO_R_CNT16 , A.GO_R_CNT17 , A.GO_R_CNT4 + A.GO_R_CNT5 + A.GO_R_CNT6 + A.GO_R_CNT7 + A.GO_R_CNT8 + A.GO_R_CNT9 + A.GO_R_CNT10 + A.GO_R_CNT11 + A.GO_R_CNT12 + A.GO_R_CNT13 + A.GO_R_CNT14 + A.GO_R_CNT15 + A.GO_R_CNT16 + A.GO_R_CNT17 AS GO_R_CNT_B_SUM , A.GO_R_CNT1 + A.GO_R_CNT2 + A.GO_R_CNT3 + A.GO_R_CNT4 + A.GO_R_CNT5 + A.GO_R_CNT6 + A.GO_R_CNT7 + A.GO_R_CNT8 + A.GO_R_CNT9 + A.GO_R_CNT10 + A.GO_R_CNT11 + A.GO_R_CNT12 + A.GO_R_CNT13 + A.GO_R_CNT14 + A.GO_R_CNT15 + A.GO_R_CNT16 + A.GO_R_CNT17 AS GO_R_CNT_TOT
, NVL(B.GO_H_CNT1,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT1 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT2,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT2 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT3,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT3 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT1,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT2,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT3,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT_G_SUM , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT4,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT4 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT5,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT5 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT6,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT6 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT7,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT7 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT8,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT8 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT9,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT9 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT10,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT10 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT11,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT11 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT12,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT12 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT13,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT13 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT14,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT14 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT15,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT15 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT16,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT16 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT17,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT17 , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT4,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT5,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT6,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT7,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT8,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT9,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT10,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT11,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT12,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT13,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT14,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT15,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT16,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT17,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT_B_SUM , NVL(B.GO_H_CNT1,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT2,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT3,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT4,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT5,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT6,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT7,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT8,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT9,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT10,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT11,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT12,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT13,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT14,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT15,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT16,0) + NVL(B.GO_H_CNT17,0) AS b_GO_H_CNT_TOT

, A.GOMO_CNT1 , A.GOMO_CNT2 , A.GOMO_CNT3 , A.GOMO_CNT4 , A.GOMO_CNT5 , A.GOMO_CNT6 , A.GOMO_CNT7 , A.GOMO_CNT8
, A.YO_C_CNT1 , A.YO_C_CNT2 , A.YO_C_CNT3 , A.YO_C_CNT4 , A.YO_C_CNT5 , A.YO_C_CNT6 , A.YO_C_CNT2 + A.YO_C_CNT3 + A.YO_C_CNT4 + A.YO_C_CNT5 + A.YO_C_CNT6 AS YO_C_CNT_TOT , NVL(B.YO_C_CNT1,0) AS B_YO_C_CNT1
, A.YO_L_CNT1 , A.YO_L_CNT2 , A.YO_L_CNT3 , A.YO_L_CNT4 , A.YO_L_CNT5 , A.YO_L_CNT6 , A.YO_L_CNT2 + A.YO_L_CNT3 + A.YO_L_CNT4 + A.YO_L_CNT5 + A.YO_L_CNT6 AS YO_L_CNT_TOT , NVL(B.YO_L_CNT1,0) AS B_YO_L_CNT1
, A.STR_CNT1 , A.STR_CNT2 , A.STR_CNT3 , A.STR_CNT4 , A.STR_CNT5 , A.STR_CNT6 , A.STR_CNT7 , NVL(B.STR_CNT7,0) AS B_STR_CNT7
, A.CTR_CNT1 , A.CTR_CNT2 , A.CTR_CNT3 , A.CTR_CNT4 , A.CTR_CNT5 , A.CTR_CNT6 , NVL(B.CTR_CNT6,0) AS B_CTR_CNT6
, A.JH_CNT1 , A.JH_CNT2 , NVL(B.JH_CNT2,0) AS B_JH_CNT2 , A.JH_CNT3 , NVL(B.JH_CNT3,0) AS B_JH_CNT3 , A.JH_CNT4 , NVL(B.JH_CNT4,0) AS B_JH_CNT4 , A.JH_CNT2 + A.JH_CNT3 + A.JH_CNT4 AS JH_CNT2_TOT , NVL(B.JH_CNT3,0) + NVL(B.JH_CNT3,0) + NVL(B.JH_CNT4,0) AS JH_CNT3_TOT
, A.NI_CNT1 , A.NI_CNT2 , A.NI_CNT3 , A.NI_CNT4 , A.NI_CNT5 , A.NI_CNT6 , A.NI_CNT1 + A.NI_CNT2 + A.NI_CNT3 AS NI_CNT_TOT1 , A.NI_CNT4 + A.NI_CNT5 + A.NI_CNT6 AS NI_CNT_TOT2
, A.JA_CNT1 , NVL(B.JA_CNT1,0) AS B_JA_CNT1 , A.JA_CNT2 , NVL(B.JA_CNT2,0) AS B_JA_CNT2 , A.JA_CNT3 , NVL(B.JA_CNT3,0) AS B_JA_CNT3
, A.JIK_CNT1 , A.JIK_CNT2 , A.JIK_CNT3 , A.JIK_CNT4 , A.JIK_CNT2 + A.JIK_CNT4 AS JIK_CNT_TOT
, A.DR_DT , A.DR_TIME , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO , A.CHG_DT , A.CHG_TIME , A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM (SELECT * FROM SRBA_TONGJE_MONTHLY_R WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM SRBA_TONGJE_MONTHLY_R WHERE VALT_YYMM = DATE_FORMAT(TIMESTAMPADD(DAY, -20, CONCAT(#{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '01'), '%Y%m'))) B ON 1=1

SELECT '0' AS SELECTED ,GRP_C ,GRP_C_NM ,GRP_B_C ,NOTE_CTNT ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DR_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DR_DT ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DR_TIME, 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_TIME ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHG_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHG_DT ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHG_TIME, 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_TIME ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM FROM SRBA2_GRP_C WHERE GRP_B_C LIKE (#{CCD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%') AND (GRP_C LIKE (#{CODE_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%') OR GRP_C_NM LIKE ('%' || #{CODE_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%')) ORDER BY GRP_C

SELECT '0' AS SELECTED , T1.GRP_C /* 그룹코드 */ , DTL_C /* 상세코드 */ , DTL_C_NM /* 상세코드명 */ , USYN /* 사용여부 */ , SNO /* 순번 */ , HGRK_GRP_C /* 상위그룹코드 */ , (SELECT GRP_C_NM FROM SRBA2_GRP_C WHERE GRP_C = T1.HGRK_GRP_C) AS HGRK_GRP_C_NM /* 상위그룹코드명 */ , HGRK_DTL_C /* 상위상세코드 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = T1.HGRK_GRP_C AND DTL_C = T1.HGRK_DTL_C) AS HGRK_DTL_C_NM /* 상위상세코드명 */ , TMP01 /* TMP01 */ , TMP02 /* TMP02 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DR_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DR_DT /* 등록일자 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DR_TIME, 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_TIME /* 등록시간 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM /* 등록조작자번호 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHG_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHG_DT /* 변경일자 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHG_TIME, 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_TIME /* 변경시간 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM /* 변경조작자번호 */ FROM SRBA2_DTL_C T1 WHERE 1=1 AND GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY GRP_C, SNO
SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM SRBA2_GRP_C WHERE GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
DELETE FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = #{GRP_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
SELECT BRNO , BRNO_NM , HGRK_BRNO , HGRK_BRNO_NM , MOFC_BRN_CCD , (CASE WHEN AML_TJ_BRNO_YN = '0' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS AML_TJ_BRNO_YN
, (CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(A01) = '0' THEN TO_CHAR(A01) ELSE CONCAT(A01, '(', A02, ')') END) AS BRNO3 /*aml전담직원 */ , (CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(B01) = '0' THEN TO_CHAR(B01) ELSE CONCAT(B01, '(', B02, ')') END) AS BRNO4 /*aml관리자 */ , (CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(C01) = '0' THEN TO_CHAR(C01) ELSE CONCAT(C01, '(', C02, ')') END) AS BRNO5 /*보고책임자 */ , (CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(D01) = '0' THEN TO_CHAR(D01) ELSE CONCAT(D01, '(', D02, ')') END) AS BRNO6 /*보고담당지 */ , (CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(E01) = '0' THEN TO_CHAR(E01) ELSE CONCAT(E01, '(', E02, ')') END) AS BRNO7 /*부서장 */ , (CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(F01) = '0' THEN TO_CHAR(F01) ELSE CONCAT(F01, '(', F02, ')') END) AS BRNO8 /*시스템관리자 */ FROM( SELECT T01.DPRT_CD AS BRNO , T01.DPRT_NM AS BRNO_NM , T01.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD AS HGRK_BRNO , (SELECT MAX(DEP_TITLE) FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = T01.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD) AS HGRK_BRNO_NM , '' AS AML_TJ_BRNO_YN , T01.MOFC_BRN_CCD , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T11, C_USER T12, C_DEP_INFO T13 WHERE T11.USER_ID = T12.USER_ID AND T12.DEP_ID = T13.DEP_ID AND T11.ROLE_ID = '8' AND T13.DEP_DESC = T01.DPRT_CD ) AS A01 , ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(T12.USER_NM ORDER BY T12.USER_NM SEPARATOR ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY T12.USER_NM) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T11, C_USER T12, C_DEP_INFO T13 WHERE T11.USER_ID = T12.USER_ID AND T12.DEP_ID = T13.DEP_ID AND T11.ROLE_ID = '8' AND T13.DEP_DESC = T01.DPRT_CD ) AS A02 , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T11, C_USER T12, C_DEP_INFO T13 WHERE T11.USER_ID = T12.USER_ID AND T12.DEP_ID = T13.DEP_ID AND T11.ROLE_ID = '4' AND T13.DEP_DESC = T01.DPRT_CD ) AS B01 , ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(T12.USER_NM ORDER BY T12.USER_NM SEPARATOR ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY T12.USER_NM) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T11, C_USER T12, C_DEP_INFO T13 WHERE T11.USER_ID = T12.USER_ID AND T12.DEP_ID = T13.DEP_ID AND T11.ROLE_ID = '4' AND T13.DEP_DESC = T01.DPRT_CD ) AS B02 , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T11, C_USER T12, C_DEP_INFO T13 WHERE T11.USER_ID = T12.USER_ID AND T12.DEP_ID = T13.DEP_ID AND T11.ROLE_ID = '5' AND T13.DEP_DESC = T01.DPRT_CD ) AS C01 , ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(T12.USER_NM ORDER BY T12.USER_NM SEPARATOR ',') FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T11, C_USER T12, C_DEP_INFO T13 WHERE T11.USER_ID = T12.USER_ID AND T12.DEP_ID = T13.DEP_ID AND T11.ROLE_ID = '5' AND T13.DEP_DESC = T01.DPRT_CD ) AS C02 , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T11, C_USER T12, C_DEP_INFO T13 WHERE T11.USER_ID = T12.USER_ID AND T12.DEP_ID = T13.DEP_ID AND T11.ROLE_ID = '13' AND T13.DEP_DESC = T01.DPRT_CD ) AS D01 , ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(T12.USER_NM ORDER BY T12.USER_NM SEPARATOR ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY T12.USER_NM) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T11, C_USER T12, C_DEP_INFO T13 WHERE T11.USER_ID = T12.USER_ID AND T12.DEP_ID = T13.DEP_ID AND T11.ROLE_ID = '13' AND T13.DEP_DESC = T01.DPRT_CD ) AS D02 , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T11, C_USER T12, C_DEP_INFO T13 WHERE T11.USER_ID = T12.USER_ID AND T12.DEP_ID = T13.DEP_ID AND T11.ROLE_ID = '14' AND T13.DEP_DESC = T01.DPRT_CD ) AS E01 , ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(T12.USER_NM ORDER BY T12.USER_NM SEPARATOR ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY T12.USER_NM) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T11, C_USER T12, C_DEP_INFO T13 WHERE T11.USER_ID = T12.USER_ID AND T12.DEP_ID = T13.DEP_ID AND T11.ROLE_ID = '14' AND T13.DEP_DESC = T01.DPRT_CD ) AS E02 , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T11, C_USER T12, C_DEP_INFO T13 WHERE T11.USER_ID = T12.USER_ID AND T12.DEP_ID = T13.DEP_ID AND T11.ROLE_ID = '7' AND T13.DEP_DESC = T01.DPRT_CD ) AS F01 , ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(T12.USER_NM ORDER BY T12.USER_NM SEPARATOR ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY T12.USER_NM) FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE T11, C_USER T12, C_DEP_INFO T13 WHERE T11.USER_ID = T12.USER_ID AND T12.DEP_ID = T13.DEP_ID AND T11.ROLE_ID = '7' AND T13.DEP_DESC = T01.DPRT_CD ) AS F02 FROM NIC41B T01 WHERE 1=1 AND T01.USE_CCD = 'Y' -- AND (SELECT USE_CCD FROM NIC41B B WHERE B.DPRT_CD = T01.HG_RNK_DPRT_CD)='Y' ) WHERE 1=1
AND BRNO_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{HGRK_BRNO_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
ORDER BY MOFC_BRN_CCD,HGRK_BRNO,BRNO
SELECT NVL(MAX(SNO),0)+1 AS SNO FROM SRBA2_ML_EXP_I
SELECT RBA_ATTCH_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS SEQ FROM DUAL
mapper.update: DELETE FROM SRBA2_ML_EXP_I WHERE IN_DT = #{IN_DT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SNO = #{SNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
SELECT T01.USER_ID , T01.LOGIN_ID , T01.USER_NM , GET_CODE_NAME('S015',T01.POSITION_CODE) as POSITION_NM , T01.POSITION_CODE , T01.DEP_ID , (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(ROLE_ID order by ROLE_ID) AS DD FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE WHERE T01.USER_ID = USER_ID) AS ROLE_ID FROM C_USER T01 , C_DEP_INFO T02, NIC41B T03 WHERE T01.DEP_ID = T02.DEP_ID AND T02.DEP_DESC = T03.DPRT_CD AND T01.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T01.ACTIVE_YN = 'Y'
AND T02.DEP_DESC = #{DEP_ID,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND (T01.LOGIN_ID = #{USER_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} or T01.USER_NM like CONCAT('%', #{USER_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') )
AND ( TRIM(T01.VALID_END_DT) IS NULL OR (T01.VALID_END_DT > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')) )

SELECT ROWNUM , T03.* FROM ( SELECT T01.VALT_YYMM , T01.RBA_VALT_LGDV_C , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R513' AND DTL_C = T01.RBA_VALT_LGDV_C ) AS RBA_VALT_LGDV_C_NM , T01.RBA_VALT_SMDV_C , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R514' AND DTL_C = T01.RBA_VALT_SMDV_C ) AS RBA_VALT_SMDV_C_NM , '' as EXP_TRM , T01.VALT_SDT , T01.VALT_EDT , T01.REAL_EDT , CASE WHEN T01.RBA_VALT_SMDV_C IN ('C01', 'C02', 'C03', 'C04', 'D01') AND NVL(T01.TGT_TRN_EDT, '') IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(T01.TGT_TRN_EDT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 1), 'YYYYMM') || '01' ELSE T01.TGT_TRN_SDT END AS TGT_TRN_SDT , CASE WHEN T01.RBA_VALT_SMDV_C IN ('C01', 'C02', 'C03', 'C04', 'D01') AND NVL(T01.TGT_TRN_EDT, '') IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(T01.TGT_TRN_EDT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 2)), 'YYYYMMDD') ELSE T01.TGT_TRN_EDT END AS TGT_TRN_EDT , T01.VALT_METH_CTNT , '' as EXEC_B_BRNO_YN_NM , '' as EXEC_B_BRNO_YN , '' as EXEC_S_BRNO_YN_NM , '' as EXEC_S_BRNO_YN , T01.DR_DT , T01.DR_TIME , GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NO , T01.CHG_DT , T01.CHG_TIME , GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO , T02.ING_STEP ,NVL((SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R509' AND DTL_C = T02.ING_STEP ),'배치 실행준비') AS ING_STEP_NM , T02.ATTCH_FILE_NO , CASE WHEN T01.RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'C03' THEN (SELECT NVL(MAX(RBA_BTCH_S_C),0) from SRBA_BTCH_I where VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ING_STEP IN ('20','21')) WHEN T01.RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'D01' THEN (SELECT NVL(MAX(RBA_BTCH_S_C),0) from SRBA_BTCH_I where VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ING_STEP IN ('10','11')) ELSE '0' end AS BAT_STATE , (SELECT NVL(MAX(RBA_BTCH_S_C),0) from SRBA_BTCH_I where VALT_YYMM =#{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS BAT_ING_STEP , T02.FIX_YN , T02.RSK_FIX_YN , T02.TONGJE_FIX_YN , T03.C01_VALT_SDT , T03.C01_VALT_EDT , T03.C01_REAL_EDT FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D T01 INNER JOIN SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M T02 ON T01.VALT_YYMM = T02.VALT_YYMM CROSS JOIN (SELECT NVL(NULLIF(VALT_SDT,''),'EMPTY') AS C01_VALT_SDT , NVL(NULLIF(VALT_EDT,''),'EMPTY') AS C01_VALT_EDT , NVL(NULLIF(REAL_EDT,''),'EMPTY') AS C01_REAL_EDT FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D WHERE 1=1 AND VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'C01' ) T03 ) T03 WHERE 1=1 AND T03.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C != 'B03' ORDER BY (CASE WHEN RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'A01' THEN 1 WHEN RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'A02' THEN 2 WHEN RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'B01' THEN 3 WHEN RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'B02' THEN 4 WHEN RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'D03' THEN 5 WHEN RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'C01' THEN 6 WHEN RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'C03' THEN 7 WHEN RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'C02' THEN 8 WHEN RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'C04' THEN 9 WHEN RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'D01' THEN 10 END)

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NULL) AS CNT, T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER, T01.DATA_G, T01.FILE_POS, T01.LOSC_FILE_NM, T01.PHSC_FILE_NM, T01.FILE_SIZE, T01.DOWNLOAD_CNT, T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM, T01.DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE T01 , SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M T02 WHERE T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO = T02.ATTCH_FILE_NO AND T02.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NULL) AS CNT , T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO , T01.FILE_SER , T01.DATA_G , T01.FILE_POS , T01.LOSC_FILE_NM , T01.PHSC_FILE_NM , T01.FILE_SIZE , T01.DOWNLOAD_CNT , T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO , GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM , T01.DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE T01 INNER JOIN SRBA2_CNTL_I T02 ON T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO = T02.ATTCH_FILE_NO AND T02.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.CNTL_CATG_C = #{CNTL_CATG_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.CNTL_ELMN_C = #{CNTL_ELMN_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.VALT_BRNO_C = #{VALT_BRNO_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NULL) AS CNT , T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO , T01.FILE_SER , T01.DATA_G , T01.FILE_POS , T01.LOSC_FILE_NM , T01.PHSC_FILE_NM , T01.FILE_SIZE , T01.DOWNLOAD_CNT , T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO , GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM , T01.DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE T01 INNER JOIN SRBA2_CNTL_RECOVER_PLAN T02 ON T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO = T02.ATTCH_FILE_NO AND T02.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.CNTL_CATG_C = #{CNTL_CATG_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.CNTL_ELMN_C = #{CNTL_ELMN_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T02.VALT_BRNO_C = #{VALT_BRNO_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER
mapper.update:
UPDATE SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D SET VALT_SDT = #{VALT_SDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VALT_EDT = #{VALT_EDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TGT_TRN_SDT = #{TGT_TRN_SDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TGT_TRN_EDT = #{TGT_TRN_EDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RBA_VALT_LGDV_C = #{RBA_VALT_LGDV_C} AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C IN ( #{RBA_VALT_SMDV_C})

UPDATE SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D SET VALT_SDT = #{VALT_SDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VALT_EDT = #{VALT_EDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TGT_TRN_SDT = #{TGT_TRN_SDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TGT_TRN_EDT = #{TGT_TRN_EDT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT VALT_YYMM AS CODE , SUBSTR(VALT_YYMM, 1, 4) || '년' || SUBSTR(VALT_YYMM, 5, 2) || '월' AS NAME FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M WHERE 1=1 AND VALT_YYMM != 999912 ORDER BY VALT_YYMM DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(VALT_YYMM || '01', 'YYYYMMDD'), 1), 'YYYYMM') AS COPY_DATE , (SELECT MAX(VALT_YYMM) FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M WHERE VALT_YYMM != 999912 ) AS VALT_YYMM
, CASE WHEN SUBSTR(VALT_YYMM,5,2) = '06' THEN SUBSTR(VALT_YYMM,1,4) || '12' ELSE TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(VALT_YYMM || '06', 'YYYYMMDD'), 12), 'YYYYMM') END COPY_YYMM FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M WHERE 1=1 AND VALT_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(VALT_YYMM) FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M WHERE VALT_YYMM != 999912 ) AND VALT_YYMM != 999912
mapper.update: INSERT INTO SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M ( VALT_YYMM , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO , CHG_DT , CHG_TIME , CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

INSERT INTO SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D ( VALT_YYMM , RBA_VALT_LGDV_C , RBA_VALT_SMDV_C , VALT_SDT , VALT_EDT , REAL_EDT , TGT_TRN_SDT , TGT_TRN_EDT , VALT_METH_CTNT , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO , CHG_DT , CHG_TIME , CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , NVL(B.RBA_VALT_LGDV_C, A.RBA_VALT_LGDV_C) AS RBA_VALT_LGDV_C , NVL(B.RBA_VALT_SMDV_C, A.RBA_VALT_SMDV_C) AS RBA_VALT_SMDV_C , '' , '' , '' , '' , '' , NVL(B.VALT_METH_CTNT, A.VALT_METH_CTNT) AS VALT_METH_CTNT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D A /* 기본데이터 */ LEFT JOIN SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D B /* 직전년도 데이터 */ ON A.VALT_YYMM = B.VALT_YYMM AND A.RBA_VALT_LGDV_C = B.RBA_VALT_LGDV_C AND A.RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = B.RBA_VALT_SMDV_C AND B.VALT_YYMM = NVL(#{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'') WHERE 1=1 AND A.VALT_YYMM = '999912'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM SRBA_KRI_SCOR_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT DISTINCT NVL(GYLJ_S_C,'ZERO') AS GYLJ_S_C FROM SRBA_KRI_IMPV_I WHERE BAS_YYMM LIKE CONCAT(SUBSTR( #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , 0, 4 ), '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SRBA_KRI_IMPV_I WHERE BAS_YYMM LIKE CONCAT(SUBSTR( #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , 0, 4 ), '%')
SELECT MAX(GYLJ_DT) AS GYLJ_DT FROM SRBA_KRI_IMPV_I WHERE BAS_YYMM LIKE CONCAT(SUBSTR( #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , 0, 4 ), '%')
SELECT DISTINCT DR_DT FROM SRBA_KRI_SCOR_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM SRBA2_DEPT_MNT WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도

INSERT INTO SRBA2_RISK_WEGHT_M ( VALT_YYMM , RSK_WEIGHT_KIND_C , RSK_WEGHT , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO , CHG_DT , CHG_TIME , CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , NVL(B.RSK_WEIGHT_KIND_C,A.RSK_WEIGHT_KIND_C) AS RSK_WEIGHT_KIND_C , NVL(B.RSK_WEGHT,A.RSK_WEGHT) AS RSK_WEGHT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM SRBA2_RISK_WEGHT_M A LEFT JOIN SRBA2_RISK_WEGHT_M B ON A.VALT_YYMM = B.VALT_YYMM AND A.RSK_WEIGHT_KIND_C = B.RSK_WEIGHT_KIND_C AND B.VALT_YYMM = NVL(#{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'') WHERE 1=1 AND A.VALT_YYMM = '999912'

INSERT INTO SRBA2_RISK_ELMT_M ( VALT_YYMM , RSK_CATG_C , RSK_ELMT_C , RSK_WEGHT , RSK_ELMT_DTL_CTNT , RSK_CTNT , CAL_METH_CTNT , KRI_CAL_METH_CTNT , H_RSK_YN , WLF_YN , NORM_YN , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO , CHG_DT , CHG_TIME , CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , NVL(B.RSK_CATG_C, A.RSK_CATG_C) AS RSK_CATG_C , NVL(B.RSK_ELMT_C, A.RSK_ELMT_C) AS RSK_ELMT_C , NVL(B.RSK_WEGHT, A.RSK_WEGHT) AS RSK_WEGHT , NVL(B.RSK_ELMT_DTL_CTNT, A.RSK_ELMT_DTL_CTNT) AS RSK_ELMT_DTL_CTNT , NVL(B.RSK_CTNT, A.RSK_CTNT) AS RSK_CTNT , NVL(B.CAL_METH_CTNT, A.CAL_METH_CTNT) AS CAL_METH_CTNT , NVL(B.KRI_CAL_METH_CTNT, A.KRI_CAL_METH_CTNT) AS KRI_CAL_METH_CTNT , NVL(B.H_RSK_YN, A.H_RSK_YN) AS H_RSK_YN , NVL(B.WLF_YN, A.WLF_YN) AS WLF_YN , NVL(B.NORM_YN, A.NORM_YN) AS NORM_YN , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM SRBA2_RISK_ELMT_M A /* 기본데이터 */ LEFT JOIN SRBA2_RISK_ELMT_M B /* 직전년도 데이터 */ ON A.RSK_CATG_C = B.RSK_CATG_C AND A.RSK_ELMT_C = B.RSK_ELMT_C AND B.VALT_YYMM = NVL(#{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'') WHERE 1=1 AND A.VALT_YYMM = '999912'

INSERT INTO SRBA2_RISK_SCNR_I ( VALT_YYMM , RSK_CATG_C , RSK_ELMT_C , SCNR_ID , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , NVL(B.RSK_CATG_C,A.RSK_CATG_C) AS RSK_CATG_C , NVL(B.RSK_ELMT_C,A.RSK_ELMT_C) AS RSK_ELMT_C , NVL(B.SCNR_ID,A.SCNR_ID) AS CNTL_CATG_C , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM SRBA2_RISK_SCNR_I A LEFT JOIN SRBA2_RISK_SCNR_I B ON A.RSK_CATG_C = B.RSK_CATG_C AND A.RSK_ELMT_C = B.RSK_ELMT_C AND A.SCNR_ID = B.SCNR_ID AND B.VALT_YYMM = NVL(#{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'') WHERE 1=1 AND A.VALT_YYMM = '999912'

INSERT INTO SRBA2_CNTL_ELMN_M ( VALT_YYMM , CNTL_CATG_C , CNTL_ELMN_C , EVAL_TYPE_CD , CNTL_ELMN_DTL_CTNT , NORM_YN , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO , CHG_DT , CHG_TIME , CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , NVL(B.CNTL_CATG_C,A.CNTL_CATG_C) AS CNTL_CATG_C , NVL(B.CNTL_ELMN_C,A.CNTL_ELMN_C) AS CNTL_ELMN_C , NVL(B.EVAL_TYPE_CD,A.EVAL_TYPE_CD) AS EVAL_TYPE_CD , NVL(B.CNTL_ELMN_DTL_CTNT,A.CNTL_ELMN_DTL_CTNT) AS CNTL_ELMN_DTL_CTNT , NVL(B.NORM_YN,A.NORM_YN) AS NORM_YN , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM SRBA2_CNTL_ELMN_M A /* 기본데이터 */ LEFT JOIN SRBA2_CNTL_ELMN_M B /* 직전년도 데이터 */ ON A.CNTL_CATG_C = B.CNTL_CATG_C AND A.CNTL_ELMN_C = B.CNTL_ELMN_C AND B.VALT_YYMM = NVL(#{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'') WHERE 1=1 AND A.VALT_YYMM = '999912'

INSERT INTO SRBA2_CNTL_ITEM_D ( VALT_YYMM , CNTL_CATG_C , CNTL_ELMN_C , SNO , TONGJE_TARGET /* 통제목표 */ , ISPT_ITEM_CTNT /* 평가항목 */ , USE_YN /* USE_YN */ , REPEAT_RANGE_C /* 평가주기코드(R532) */ , TONGJE_TP_C /* 통제유형코드(R506) */ , TONGJE_ISP_STEP /* 세부평가항목 */ , APVL_EVIDENCE /* 평가대상증빙 */ , APVL_STDRD /* 평가기준 */ , WEIGHT /* 가중치 */ , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO , CHG_DT , CHG_TIME , CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , NVL(B.CNTL_CATG_C,A.CNTL_CATG_C) AS CNTL_CATG_C , NVL(B.CNTL_ELMN_C,A.CNTL_ELMN_C) AS CNTL_ELMN_C , NVL(B.SNO,A.SNO) AS SNO , NVL(B.TONGJE_TARGET,A.TONGJE_TARGET) AS TONGJE_TARGET , NVL(B.ISPT_ITEM_CTNT,A.ISPT_ITEM_CTNT) AS ISPT_ITEM_CTNT , NVL(B.USE_YN,A.USE_YN) AS USE_YN , NVL(B.REPEAT_RANGE_C,A.REPEAT_RANGE_C) AS REPEAT_RANGE_C , NVL(B.TONGJE_TP_C,A.TONGJE_TP_C) AS TONGJE_TP_C , NVL(B.TONGJE_ISP_STEP,A.TONGJE_ISP_STEP) AS TONGJE_ISP_STEP , NVL(B.APVL_EVIDENCE,A.APVL_EVIDENCE) AS APVL_EVIDENCE , NVL(B.APVL_STDRD,A.APVL_STDRD) AS APVL_STDRD , NVL(B.WEIGHT,A.WEIGHT) AS WEIGHT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM SRBA2_CNTL_ITEM_D A /* 기본데이터 */ LEFT JOIN SRBA2_CNTL_ITEM_D B /* 직전년도 */ ON A.CNTL_CATG_C = B.CNTL_CATG_C AND A.CNTL_ELMN_C = B.CNTL_ELMN_C AND A.SNO = B.SNO AND B.VALT_YYMM = NVL(#{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'') WHERE 1=1 AND A.VALT_YYMM = '999912'

INSERT INTO SRBA2_CNTL_BRNO_I ( VALT_YYMM , CNTL_CATG_C , CNTL_ELMN_C , VALT_BRNO_C , TGT_YN , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , NVL(B.CNTL_CATG_C, A.CNTL_CATG_C) AS CNTL_CATG_C , NVL(B.CNTL_ELMN_C, A.CNTL_ELMN_C) AS CNTL_ELMN_C , NVL(B.VALT_BRNO_C, A.VALT_BRNO_C) AS VALT_BRNO_C , NVL(B.TGT_YN, A.TGT_YN) AS TGT_YN , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM SRBA2_CNTL_BRNO_I A LEFT JOIN SRBA2_CNTL_BRNO_I B ON A.CNTL_CATG_C = B.CNTL_CATG_C AND A.CNTL_ELMN_C = B.CNTL_ELMN_C AND A.VALT_BRNO_C = B.VALT_BRNO_C AND B.VALT_YYMM = NVL(#{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'') WHERE 1=1
AND A.VALT_YYMM = '999912'

INSERT INTO SRBA2_DEPT_MNT ( VALT_YYMM , VALT_BRNO_C , BRNO_TYPE_CD , NORM_YN , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO , CHG_DT , CHG_TIME , CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS VALT_YYMM , NVL(B.VALT_BRNO_C, A.VALT_BRNO_C) AS VALT_BRNO_C , NVL(B.BRNO_TYPE_CD, A.BRNO_TYPE_CD) AS BRNO_TYPE_CD , NVL(B.NORM_YN, A.NORM_YN) AS NORM_YN , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM SRBA2_DEPT_MNT A LEFT JOIN SRBA2_DEPT_MNT B ON A.VALT_BRNO_C = B.VALT_BRNO_C AND B.VALT_YYMM = NVL(#{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'') WHERE 1=1 AND A.VALT_YYMM = '999912'

INSERT INTO SRBA_BTCH_I ( VALT_YYMM ,ING_STEP ,RBA_BTCH_DT ,RBA_BTCH_SDT ,RBA_BTCH_EDT ,RBA_BTCH_S_C ,ERR_CTNT ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ) VALUES ( #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , 0 , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , '99991231' , 0 -- 상태 최초 , '' , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') )

UPDATE SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M SET FIX_YN = #{FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- (0:진행 , 1:확정) , FIX_DT = CASE WHEN #{FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} = '1' THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ELSE '' END -- 확정된일자 , FIX_JKW_NO = #{FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 확정된사람 , ING_STEP = case #{FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} when '1' then '0' else NULL end , CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') -- 수정일자 , CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') -- 수정시간 , CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 수정자 WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도

UPDATE SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D SET REAL_EDT = case when #{FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} = '1' then TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') else '' end , -- 실제종료일자 CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도 AND RBA_VALT_LGDV_C='A' AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C='A01'
DELETE FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도
DELETE FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도
DELETE FROM SRBA2_RISK_WEGHT_M WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도
DELETE FROM SRBA2_RISK_ELMT_M WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도
DELETE FROM SRBA2_RISK_SCNR_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도
DELETE FROM SRBA2_CNTL_ELMN_M WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도
DELETE FROM SRBA2_CNTL_ITEM_D WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도
DELETE FROM SRBA2_CNTL_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도
DELETE FROM SRBA2_CNTL_ITEM_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도
DELETE FROM SRBA2_CNTL_BRNO_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도
DELETE FROM SRBA_BTCH_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도

UPDATE SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M SET ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
DELETE FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE WHERE ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select: SELECT VALT_YYMM AS CODE , CONCAT(VALT_YYMM, '월') AS NAME FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT VALT_YYMM AS VALT_YYMM FROM SRBA_BIZRPT_D_M WHERE VALT_YYMM IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(VALT_YYMM)) != 0 ) A ORDER BY VALT_YYMM DESC
SELECT A.BIZ_RPT_ID AS CODE , CONCAT(A.BIZ_RPT_NM, '(', A.BIZ_RPT_ID, ')' )AS NAME FROM SRBA_BIZRPT_M A ORDER BY A.BIZ_RPT_ID

SELECT ATTCH_FILE_NO , FILE_SER , DATA_G , FILE_POS , LOSC_FILE_NM , PHSC_FILE_NM , FILE_SIZE , DOWNLOAD_CNT , DR_OP_JKW_NO , GET_LOGINID_NAME(DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM , DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE WHERE ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND FILE_SER = #{FILE_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO SRBA2_CNTL_I ( VALT_YYMM , CNTL_CATG_C , CNTL_ELMN_C , VALT_BRNO_C , GYLJ_ID , GYLJ_DT , GYLJ_S_C , GYLJ_JKW_NO , GYLJ_ROLE_ID , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO , FIX_YN , FIX_DT , FIX_JKW_NO ) SELECT VALT_YYMM , CNTL_CATG_C , CNTL_ELMN_C , VALT_BRNO_C , 0 GYLJ_ID , '' GYLJ_DT , '' GYLJ_S_C , '' GYLJ_JKW_NO , 0 GYLJ_ROLE_ID , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') DR_DT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') DR_TIME , #{DT_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} DR_OP_JKW_NO , 0 FIX_YN , '' FIX_DT , '' FIX_JKW_NO FROM SRBA2_CNTL_BRNO_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TGT_YN = 1

INSERT INTO SRBA2_CNTL_ITEM_I ( VALT_YYMM , CNTL_CATG_C , CNTL_ELMN_C , SNO , VALT_BRNO_C , TONGJE_TARGET , ISPT_ITEM_CTNT , USE_YN , REPEAT_RANGE_C , TONGJE_TP_C , TONGJE_ISP_STEP , APVL_EVIDENCE , APVL_STDRD , WEIGHT , CHG_RSN_CTNT , ORI_NORM_YN , NORM_YN , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT A.VALT_YYMM , A.CNTL_CATG_C , A.CNTL_ELMN_C , A.SNO , B.VALT_BRNO_C , A.TONGJE_TARGET , A.ISPT_ITEM_CTNT , A.USE_YN , A.REPEAT_RANGE_C , A.TONGJE_TP_C , A.TONGJE_ISP_STEP , A.APVL_EVIDENCE , A.APVL_STDRD , A.WEIGHT , NULL CHG_RSN_CTNT , NULL ORI_NORM_YN , NULL NORM_YN , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') DR_DT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') DR_TIME , #{DT_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM SRBA2_CNTL_ITEM_D A INNER JOIN SRBA2_CNTL_BRNO_I B ON A.VALT_YYMM = B.VALT_YYMM AND A.CNTL_CATG_C = B.CNTL_CATG_C AND A.CNTL_ELMN_C = B.CNTL_ELMN_C AND B.TGT_YN = 1 WHERE A.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

UPDATE SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D SET REAL_EDT = case when #{FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} = '1' then TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') else '' end , -- 실제종료일자 CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RBA_VALT_LGDV_C='C' AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C IN ('C02') /* C02:통제효과성 */
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SRBA2_CNTL_SCOR_I ( VALT_YYMM , CNTL_CATG_C , VALT_BRNO_C , ISPT_ITEM_CNT , NORM_ISPT_ITEM_CNT , CNTL_EFF_RT , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) SELECT VALT_YYMM , CNTL_CATG_C , VALT_BRNO_C , NVL(SUM(TOT_CNT),0) AS ISPT_ITEM_CNT /* 점검항목수 */ , NVL(SUM(NORM_YN_CNT),0) AS NORM_ISPT_ITEM_CNT /* 정상점검항목수 */ , ROUND(AVG(ELMN_RT),2) AS CNTL_EFF_RT /* 통제효과성비율 */ , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') DR_DT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') DR_TIME , 'ADMIN' DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM ( SELECT VALT_YYMM , CNTL_CATG_C , CNTL_ELMN_C , VALT_BRNO_C , COUNT(*) TOT_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(NORM_YN,'') = '' THEN 0 ELSE NORM_YN END ) NORM_YN_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(NORM_YN,'') = '' OR NVL(NORM_YN,'') = 0 THEN 0 ELSE WEIGHT END) ELMN_RT /*요소별 통제 효과성*/ FROM SRBA2_CNTL_ITEM_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY VALT_YYMM , CNTL_CATG_C , CNTL_ELMN_C , VALT_BRNO_C ) A GROUP BY VALT_YYMM , CNTL_CATG_C ,VALT_BRNO_C
mapper.select: SELECT VALT_YYMM , VALT_METH_CTNT , RBA_VALT_SMDV_C , PRE_CODE , PRE_CTNT , CASE WHEN PRE_REAL_EDT != '' OR PRE_REAL_EDT IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS CHECK_YN FROM (SELECT VALT_METH_CTNT , VALT_YYMM , REAL_EDT , RBA_VALT_SMDV_C , LAG(VALT_METH_CTNT,1,'') OVER (ORDER BY VALT_YYMM) AS PRE_CTNT , LAG(RBA_VALT_SMDV_C,1,'') OVER (ORDER BY VALT_YYMM) AS PRE_CODE , LAG(REAL_EDT,1,'') OVER (ORDER BY VALT_YYMM) AS PRE_REAL_EDT FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) A WHERE 1=1 AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = #{RBA_VALT_SMDV_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT B.VALT_YYMM , B.RSK_WEGHT , CASE WHEN NVL(C.WEGHT_FIX_YN,0) = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END WEGHT_FIX_YN , CASE WHEN NVL(D.GYLJ_S_C,0) IN ('1','2','4') THEN '진행중' WHEN NVL(D.GYLJ_S_C,'') = '' OR NVL(D.GYLJ_S_C,0) = 0 THEN '미진행' ELSE ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = D.GYLJ_S_C AND GRP_C ='R512' ) END AS GYLJ_NM , D.GYLJ_ID , D.GYLJ_DT , D.GYLJ_JKW_NO , D.GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM (SELECT * FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C='R515') A LEFT JOIN SRBA2_RISK_WEGHT_M B ON A.DTL_C = B.RSK_WEIGHT_KIND_C LEFT JOIN SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M C ON B.VALT_YYMM = C.VALT_YYMM LEFT JOIN SRBA2_GYLJ_M D ON B.VALT_YYMM = D.VALT_YYMM AND B.GYLJ_ID = D.GYLJ_ID WHERE B.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: UPDATE SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M SET WEGHT_FIX_YN = #{WEGHT_FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- (0:진행 , 1:확정) , WEGHT_FIX_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') -- 확정된일자 , WEGHT_FIX_JKW_NO = #{FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 확정된사람 , CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') -- 수정일자 , CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') -- 수정시간 , CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 수정자 WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(B.GYLJ_ID, 0) AS GYLJ_ID /* 결재ID */ , NVL(B.GYLJ_S_C, 0) AS GYLJ_S_C , E.DTL_C_NM AS GYLJ_S_C_NM /* 승인상태 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(B.GYLJ_S_C, 0) = '3' THEN 'Y' /* 결재상태코드(W014) = 3(완료) */ ELSE 'N' END FINL_GYLJ_S /* 최종승인여부 */ , NVL(( SELECT NVL(H.ROLE_ID, 0) AS ROLE_ID FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_H H WHERE H.GYLJ_ID = B.GYLJ_ID AND H.GYLJ_SER = ( SELECT MAX(GYLJ_SER) FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_H WHERE GYLJ_ID = B.GYLJ_ID ) ) , 0) AS GYLJ_ROLE_ID , (SELECT CASE WHEN B.GYLJ_S_C = '2' THEN IB.RTN_ROLE_ID ELSE IB.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID END FROM C_GYLJ_M IA INNER JOIN C_GYLJ_D IB ON IA.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = IB.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND IA.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE 1=1 AND IB.GYLJ_ROLE_ID = (SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_M WHERE GYLJ_ID = A.GYLJ_ID ) ) AS NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID ,(SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SNO = (SELECT MIN(SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) AS FIRST_GYLJ ,(SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SNO = (SELECT MAX(SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) AS END_GYLJ FROM SRBA2_RISK_WEGHT_M A LEFT JOIN SRBA2_GYLJ_M B ON A.VALT_YYMM = B.VALT_YYMM AND A.GYLJ_ID = B.GYLJ_ID LEFT JOIN SRBA2_DTL_C E /* RBA 상세 코드 정보 */ ON E.GRP_C = 'R512' /* 결재상태코드 */ AND NVL(B.GYLJ_S_C, 0) = E.DTL_C /* 결재상태코드 */ WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select zz.F as NATION_ENM , zz.D as NATION_NM , zz.C as NATION_CD , yy.ITEM_SCR as NATION_RS , max(zz.aa) as T_NATION , max(zz.bb) as G_NATION ,CASE WHEN max(xx.NTN_CD) IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' end AS S_NATION , max(zz.cc) as J1_NATION , max(zz.dd) as J2_NATION , max(zz.ee) as B_NATION , max(zz.ff) as B2_NATION , max(zz.gg) as J3_NATION from (select z.F, z.D, z.C , case z.A when '1' then 'Y' else '' end as aa , case z.A when '2' then 'Y' else '' end as bb , case z.A when '3' then 'Y' else '' end as cc , case z.A when '4' then 'Y' else '' end as dd , case z.A when '5' then 'Y' else '' end as ee , case z.A when '6' then 'Y' else '' end as ff , case z.A when '7' then 'Y' else '' end as gg from (select x.A, x.B, x.C, x.D, x.F from (select a.DTL_C as A, a.DTL_C_NM as B, b.DTL_C as C, b.DTL_C_NM as D, ENG_NM as F from (select DTL_C, DTL_C_NM from SRBA2_DTL_C where GRP_C = 'R520' and USYN='1' ) a join SRBA2_DTL_C b on a.DTL_C = b.HGRK_DTL_C and b.HGRK_GRP_C = 'R520' and b.USYN = '1' left outer join (select CD, CD_NM, MAX(CNTNT) as ENG_NM from NIC92B where CD = 'A010' group by CD, CD_NM ) c on b.DTL_C = c.CD_NM ) x ) z ) zz LEFT JOIN ( SELECT B.RS4A_2 AS ITEM_VAL -- AML위험평가항목값 , A.RS45_2 AS ITEM_SCR -- AML위험평가항목점수 FROM BRS450TB A , BRS4A0TB B WHERE A.RS43_1 = B.RS43_1 AND A.RS45_1 = B.RS45_1 AND A.RS43_1 = 30382 ) yy ON zz.C = yy.ITEM_VAL LEFT JOIN ( SELECT NTN_CD FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT NTN_CD FROM NIC19B_FACTIVA A WHERE 1=1 AND A.WL_ACTIVE_STATUS = 'Y' /* 20221101 배영철 - WL_ACTIVE_STATUS 컬럼 미존재 but 쿼리사용안함 */ AND A.WC_LIST_CCD LIKE CONCAT(SUBSTR('T020', 0, 3), '%') UNION SELECT DISTINCT NTN_CD FROM NIC19B A WHERE 1=1 AND A.NORM_YN = 'Y' AND A.APPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.WC_LIST_CCD LIKE CONCAT(SUBSTR('T020', 0, 3), '%') ) ) xx ON zz.C = xx.NTN_CD WHERE 1=1
AND zz.D like CONCAT('%', #{NATION_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
group by zz.F, zz.D, zz.C,yy.ITEM_SCR order by zz.F, zz.D, zz.C

SELECT VALT_YYMM , (SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(REAL_EDT, '') IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' end FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'A02') as WEGHT_FIX_YN , (SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(REAL_EDT, '') IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' end FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'C02') as TH_BATCH_YN , (SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(REAL_EDT, '') IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' end FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'B01') as RSK_FIX_YN , (SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(REAL_EDT, '') IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' end FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'B02') as TONGJE_FIX_YN , (SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(REAL_EDT, '') IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' end FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'C01') as NC_RSK_YN , (SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(REAL_EDT, '') IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' end FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'C02') as TH_BATCH_YN , CASE TONGJE_V_FIX_YN WHEN 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS TJ_TEST_YN FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT X.VALT_YYMM , X.VALT_BRNO_C , X.BRNO_NM , X.CNTL_CNT , X.CNTL_COMP_CNT , case CNTL_CNT when 0 then 0 else (CNTL_COMP_CNT / CNTL_CNT) * 100 end as CNTL_V_RT from (select a.VALT_YYMM as VALT_YYMM , a.VALT_BRNO_C as VALT_BRNO_C , b.DEP_TITLE as BRNO_NM , count(a.VALT_BRNO_C) as CNTL_CNT , sum(case a.GYLJ_S_C when '3' then 1 else 0 end) as CNTL_COMP_CNT from SRBA2_CNTL_I a join C_DEP_INFO b on a.VALT_BRNO_C = b.DEP_DESC where a.VALT_YYMM= #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by a.VALT_YYMM, a.VALT_BRNO_C, b.DEP_TITLE ) X

select X.VALT_YYMM , X.KRI_CNTL_CNT , X.KRI_CNTL_COMP_CNT , case X.KRI_CNTL_CNT when 0 then 0 else (X.KRI_CNTL_COMP_CNT / X.KRI_CNTL_CNT) * 100 end as KRI_CNTL_V_RT from (select a.BAS_YYMM as VALT_YYMM , count(a.BAS_YYMM) as KRI_CNTL_CNT , sum(case a.GYLJ_S_C when '3' then 1 else 0 end) as KRI_CNTL_COMP_CNT from SRBA_KRI_IMPV_I a where a.BAS_YYMM like CONCAT(SUBSTR(#{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, 4), '%') and not (SUBSTR(a.BAS_YYMM,5,2) ='12' AND a.QTE_DGE != 0) group by a.BAS_YYMM ) X
mapper.update: UPDATE SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M SET TONGJE_V_FIX_YN = #{TONGJE_V_FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- (0:진행 , 1:확정) , TONGJE_V_FIX_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') -- 확정된일자 , TONGJE_V_FIX_JKW_NO = #{FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 확정된사람 , ING_STEP = case #{TONGJE_V_FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} when '1' then '99' else '20' end , CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') -- 수정일자 , CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') -- 수정시간 , CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 수정자 WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도

UPDATE SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D SET REAL_EDT = case when #{TONGJE_V_FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} = '1' then TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') else '' end , -- 실제종료일자 CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도 AND RBA_VALT_LGDV_C='C'
AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'C04'
DELETE FROM SRBA2_RISK_RLT_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도

INSERT INTO SRBA2_RISK_RLT_I SELECT A.VALT_YYMM , A.RSK_CATG_C , A.RSK_CATG_SCORE /* 고유위험 점수 */ , B.CNTL_EFF_RT /* 전사 I/B 통제효과성 */ , ROUND( A.RSK_CATG_SCORE * (B.CNTL_RISK_SCORE/100) ,2) AS RSK_CATG_RESIDUAL_RISK /* 범주별 잔여위험 */ , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') DR_DT , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') DR_TIME , 'ADMIN' DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM ( SELECT VALT_YYMM , CASE WHEN RSK_CATG_C = 'R4' THEN 'B' ELSE 'I' END AS MODEL_TYPE , RSK_CATG_C , SUM(CASE WHEN EXT_YN = 'N' THEN 0 ELSE RSK_SCORE END) AS RSK_CATG_SCORE FROM SRBA2_RSK_RSLT WHERE 1=1 AND VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY VALT_YYMM , RSK_CATG_C ) A INNER JOIN ( SELECT TA.VALT_YYMM , 'I' AS MODEL_TYPE , ROUND(AVG(TA.CNTL_EFF_RT),2) AS CNTL_EFF_RT /* I모델 전사 통제효과성 */ , 100 - ROUND(AVG(TA.CNTL_EFF_RT),2) AS CNTL_RISK_SCORE /* I모델 전사 통제위험 */ FROM ( SELECT VALT_YYMM , CNTL_CATG_C , AVG(CNTL_EFF_RT) AS CNTL_EFF_RT FROM SRBA2_CNTL_SCOR_I A /* RBA평가 범주별(부서별) 통제점수 */ WHERE 1=1 AND CNTL_CATG_C != 'C5' /* 모니터링 및 보고관리 제외(I모델)*/ GROUP BY VALT_YYMM , CNTL_CATG_C ) TA /* I모델 통제효과성 */ GROUP BY VALT_YYMM UNION ALL SELECT TA.VALT_YYMM , 'B' , ROUND(AVG(TA.CNTL_EFF_RT),2) AS CNTL_EFF_RT /* B모델 전사 통제효과성 */ , 100 - ROUND(AVG(TA.CNTL_EFF_RT),2) AS CNTL_RISK_SCORE /* I모델 전사 통제위험 */ FROM ( SELECT VALT_YYMM , CNTL_CATG_C , AVG(CNTL_EFF_RT) AS CNTL_EFF_RT FROM SRBA2_CNTL_SCOR_I A /* RBA평가 범주별(부서별) 통제점수 */ WHERE 1=1 AND CNTL_CATG_C = 'C5' /* 모니터링 및 보고관리 (B모델)*/ GROUP BY VALT_YYMM , CNTL_CATG_C ) TA /* I모델 통제효과성 */ GROUP BY VALT_YYMM ) B /* I모델, B모델 통제효과성 */ ON A.VALT_YYMM = B.VALT_YYMM AND A.MODEL_TYPE = B.MODEL_TYPE
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SRBA2_DEPT_MNT WHERE 1=1 AND VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: INSERT INTO SRBA2_DEPT_MNT ( VALT_YYMM ,VALT_BRNO_C ,BRNO_TYPE_CD ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,CHG_DT ,CHG_TIME ) VALUES ( #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM ,#{BRNO_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM ,#{BRNO_TYPE_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- PARAM ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') )
mapper.update: UPDATE SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M SET RSK_FIX_YN = #{RSK_FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- (0:진행 , 1:확정) , RSK_FIX_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') -- 확정된일자 , RSK_FIX_JKW_NO = #{FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 확정된사람 , ING_STEP = case #{RSK_FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} when '1' then '10' else '0' end , CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') -- 수정일자 , CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') -- 수정시간 , CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 수정자 WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도

UPDATE SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D SET REAL_EDT = case when #{RSK_FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} = '1' then TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') else '' end , -- 실제종료일자 CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도 AND RBA_VALT_LGDV_C='B' AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C='B01'
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(B.GYLJ_ID, 0) AS GYLJ_ID /* 결재ID */ , NVL(B.GYLJ_S_C, 0) AS GYLJ_S_C , E.DTL_C_NM AS GYLJ_S_C_NM /* 승인상태 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(B.GYLJ_S_C, 0) = '3' THEN 'Y' /* 결재상태코드(W014) = 3(완료) */ ELSE 'N' END FINL_GYLJ_S /* 최종승인여부 */ , NVL(( SELECT NVL(H.ROLE_ID, 0) AS ROLE_ID FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_H H WHERE H.GYLJ_ID = B.GYLJ_ID AND H.GYLJ_SER = ( SELECT MAX(GYLJ_SER) FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_H WHERE GYLJ_ID = B.GYLJ_ID ) ) , 0) AS GYLJ_ROLE_ID , (SELECT CASE WHEN B.GYLJ_S_C = '2' THEN IB.RTN_ROLE_ID ELSE IB.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID END FROM C_GYLJ_M IA INNER JOIN C_GYLJ_D IB ON IA.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = IB.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND IA.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE 1=1 AND IB.GYLJ_ROLE_ID = (SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_M WHERE GYLJ_ID = A.GYLJ_ID ) ) AS NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID ,(SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SNO = (SELECT MIN(SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) AS FIRST_GYLJ ,(SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SNO = (SELECT MAX(SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) AS END_GYLJ FROM SRBA2_RISK_ELMT_M A LEFT JOIN SRBA2_GYLJ_M B ON A.VALT_YYMM = B.VALT_YYMM AND A.GYLJ_ID = B.GYLJ_ID LEFT JOIN SRBA2_DTL_C E /* RBA 상세 코드 정보 */ ON E.GRP_C = 'R512' /* 결재상태코드 */ AND NVL(B.GYLJ_S_C, 0) = E.DTL_C /* 결재상태코드 */ WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: UPDATE SRBA2_RISK_ELMT_M SET RSK_ELMT_DTL_CTNT = #{RSK_ELMT_DTL_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RSK_CTNT = #{RSK_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CAL_METH_CTNT = #{CAL_METH_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, KRI_CAL_METH_CTNT = #{KRI_CAL_METH_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, H_RSK_YN = #{H_RSK_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WLF_YN = #{WLF_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NORM_YN = #{NORM_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RSK_CATG_C = #{RSK_CATG_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RSK_ELMT_C = #{RSK_ELMT_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT CASE NVL(Y.SCNR_ID,'N') WHEN 'N' THEN '0' ELSE '1' END CON_YN , X.SCNR_ID , X.SCNR_NM , #{VALT_YYMM} AS VALT_YYMM , #{RSK_CATG_C} AS RSK_CATG_C , #{RSK_ELMT_C} AS RSK_ELMT_C FROM (SELECT SCNR_ID , '[' || SCNR_ID || ']' || SCNR_NM AS SCNR_NM FROM TMS_APPL ) X LEFT OUTER JOIN SRBA2_RISK_SCNR_I Y ON X.SCNR_ID = Y.SCNR_ID AND Y.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM} AND Y.RSK_CATG_C = #{RSK_CATG_C} AND Y.RSK_ELMT_C = #{RSK_ELMT_C} ORDER BY CASE NVL(Y.SCNR_ID,'N') WHEN 'N' THEN 'Z' ELSE 'Y' END, X.SCNR_ID

SELECT A.VALT_YYMM AS VALT_YYMM , A.RSK_CATG_C AS RSK_CATG_C , A.RSK_ELMT_C AS RSK_ELMT_C , MAX(RSK_ELMT_DTL_CTNT) AS RSK_ELMT_DTL_CTNT , CASE WHEN SUM((CASE WHEN B.GUBUN = '수신' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END )) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE '' END AS DP_DMN_YN , CASE WHEN SUM((CASE WHEN B.GUBUN = '여신' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END )) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE '' END AS LN_DMN_YN , CASE WHEN SUM((CASE WHEN B.GUBUN = '카드' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END )) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE '' END AS CARD_DMN_YN , CASE WHEN SUM((CASE WHEN B.GUBUN = '공통' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END )) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE '' END AS COMN_DMN_YN , GROUP_CONCAT(A.RULE_ID ORDER BY A.VALT_YYMM, A.RSK_CATG_C, A.RSK_ELMT_C SEPARATOR ',') AS RULE_LIST FROM SRBA2_RISK_SCNR_I A , ( SELECT F.GUBUN , C.MA01_6 AS S_ID , (CASE WHEN NVL(C.MA01_6, '') = '' THEN A.BIZ_NM ELSE CONCAT('[', C.MA01_6, ']', A.BIZ_NM) END) AS NAME , (CASE WHEN NVL(C.MA01_6, '') = '' THEN A.BIZ_DESC ELSE CONCAT('[', C.MA01_6, ']', A.BIZ_DESC) END) AS DESCRIPTION FROM C_BIZ A LEFT OUTER JOIN MMA010TB C ON ( A.BIZ_ID=C.RT30_1) , C_PKG_BIZ_MAP B ,(SELECT A.BIZ_ID , (CASE WHEN NVL(C.MA01_6, '') = '' THEN A.BIZ_NM ELSE CONCAT('[', C.MA01_6, ']', A.BIZ_NM) END) AS GUBUN FROM C_BIZ A LEFT OUTER JOIN MMA010TB C ON ( A.BIZ_ID=C.RT30_1) , C_PKG_BIZ_MAP B WHERE B.PKG_ID = 6 AND A.BIZ_ID=B.BIZ_ID AND B.PAR_BIZ_ID=11 AND A.EDIT_YN = 'Y' AND B.PAR_BIZ_ID <> B.BIZ_ID ORDER BY C.MA01_6, B.DISPLAY_ORDER ) F WHERE B.PKG_ID = '6' AND A.BIZ_ID=B.BIZ_ID AND B.PAR_BIZ_ID=F.BIZ_ID AND A.EDIT_YN = 'Y' AND B.PAR_BIZ_ID <> B.BIZ_ID ORDER BY C.MA01_6, B.DISPLAY_ORDER ) B , SRBA2_RISK_ELMT_M C WHERE A.RULE_ID = B.S_ID AND A.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.RSK_CATG_C = #{RSK_CATG_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_YYMM = C.VALT_YYMM AND A.RSK_CATG_C = C.RSK_CATG_C AND A.RSK_ELMT_C = C.RSK_ELMT_C GROUP BY A.VALT_YYMM , A.RSK_CATG_C ,A.RSK_ELMT_C ORDER BY A.RSK_ELMT_C
mapper.update: UPDATE SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M SET TONGJE_FIX_YN = #{TONGJE_FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- (0:진행 , 1:확정) , TONGJE_FIX_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') -- 확정된일자 , TONGJE_FIX_JKW_NO = #{FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 확정된사람 , ING_STEP = case #{TONGJE_FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} when '1' then '20' else '0' end , CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') -- 수정일자 , CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') -- 수정시간 , CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 수정자 WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(B.GYLJ_ID, 0) AS GYLJ_ID /* 결재ID */ , NVL(B.GYLJ_S_C, 0) AS GYLJ_S_C , E.DTL_C_NM AS GYLJ_S_C_NM /* 승인상태 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(B.GYLJ_S_C, 0) = '3' THEN 'Y' /* 결재상태코드(W014) = 3(완료) */ ELSE 'N' END FINL_GYLJ_S /* 최종승인여부 */ , NVL(( SELECT NVL(H.ROLE_ID, 0) AS ROLE_ID FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_H H WHERE H.GYLJ_ID = B.GYLJ_ID AND H.GYLJ_SER = ( SELECT MAX(GYLJ_SER) FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_H WHERE GYLJ_ID = B.GYLJ_ID ) ) , 0) AS GYLJ_ROLE_ID , (SELECT CASE WHEN B.GYLJ_S_C = '2' THEN IB.RTN_ROLE_ID ELSE IB.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID END FROM C_GYLJ_M IA INNER JOIN C_GYLJ_D IB ON IA.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = IB.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND IA.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE 1=1 AND IB.GYLJ_ROLE_ID = (SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_M WHERE GYLJ_ID = A.GYLJ_ID ) ) AS NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID ,(SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SNO = (SELECT MIN(SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) AS FIRST_GYLJ ,(SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SNO = (SELECT MAX(SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) AS END_GYLJ FROM SRBA2_CNTL_ELMN_M A LEFT JOIN SRBA2_GYLJ_M B ON A.VALT_YYMM = B.VALT_YYMM AND A.GYLJ_ID = B.GYLJ_ID LEFT JOIN SRBA2_DTL_C E /* RBA 상세 코드 정보 */ ON E.GRP_C = 'R512' /* 결재상태코드 */ AND NVL(B.GYLJ_S_C, 0) = E.DTL_C /* 결재상태코드 */ WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT DISTINCT A.BRNO_TYPE_CD FROM SRBA2_DEPT_MNT A LEFT JOIN NIC41B B ON A.VALT_BRNO_C = B.MOFC_BRN_CCD WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (A.BRNO_TYPE_CD = 'M' OR A.BRNO_TYPE_CD = 'B')

SELECT * FROM SRBA2_CNTL_ELMN_M A LEFT JOIN SRBA2_CNTL_BRNO_I B ON A.CNTL_ELMN_C = B.CNTL_ELMN_C AND A.VALT_YYMM = B.VALT_YYMM WHERE (B.VALT_BRNO_C IS NULL OR B.VALT_BRNO_C = '0') AND A.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT A.VALT_YYMM , A.EVAL_TYPE_CD , A.CNTL_ELMN_C , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE USYN = 1 AND GRP_C='R505' AND DTL_C= A.CNTL_ELMN_C ) AS CNTL_ELMN_C_NM , A.CNTL_ELMN_DTL_CTNT , A.NORM_YN , A.CNTL_CATG_C , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE USYN=1 AND GRP_C='R504' AND DTL_C= A.CNTL_CATG_C ) AS CNTL_CATG_C_NM , C.TONGJE_FIX_YN as TONGJE_FIX_YN , D.VALT_BRNO_C as MNG_BRNO , D.DPRT_NM as MNG_BRNO_NM FROM SRBA2_CNTL_ELMN_M A JOIN SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M C ON A.VALT_YYMM = C.VALT_YYMM left outer join (select X.VALT_YYMM, X.CNTL_CATG_C, X.CNTL_ELMN_C, X.VALT_BRNO_C, Y.DPRT_NM from SRBA2_CNTL_BRNO_I X join NIC41B Y on X.VALT_BRNO_C = Y.DPRT_CD where VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) D on A.VALT_YYMM = D.VALT_YYMM and A.CNTL_CATG_C = D.CNTL_CATG_C and A.CNTL_ELMN_C = D.CNTL_ELMN_C WHERE A.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CNTL_CATG_C = #{CNTL_CATG_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CNTL_ELMN_C = #{CNTL_ELMN_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT A.VALT_BRNO_C AS CODE , B.DPRT_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA2_DEPT_MNT A INNER JOIN NIC41B B ON VALT_BRNO_C = B.DPRT_CD WHERE 1=1 AND A.NORM_YN = 1 AND A.BRNO_TYPE_CD != 'B' AND VALT_YYMM = #{CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: UPDATE SRBA2_CNTL_ELMN_M SET NORM_YN = 0 -- (0:미사용 , 1:사용) , CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') -- 수정일자 , CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') -- 수정시간 , CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 수정자 WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도 AND CNTL_CATG_C = #{CNTL_CATG_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CNTL_ELMN_C = #{CNTL_ELMN_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

MERGE INTO SRBA2_CNTL_BRNO_I X USING (SELECT A.VALT_YYMM, A.CNTL_CATG_C, A.CNTL_ELMN_C, B.VALT_BRNO_C, #{TGT_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS TGT_YN, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS DR_DT, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') AS DR_TIME, #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM SRBA2_CNTL_ELMN_M A LEFT JOIN SRBA2_DEPT_MNT B ON A.VALT_YYMM = B.VALT_YYMM WHERE A.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CNTL_CATG_C = #{CNTL_CATG_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CNTL_ELMN_C = #{CNTL_ELMN_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.BRNO_TYPE_CD = 'B' ) C ON ( X.VALT_YYMM = C.VALT_YYMM AND X.CNTL_CATG_C = C.CNTL_CATG_C AND X.CNTL_ELMN_C = C.CNTL_ELMN_C AND X.VALT_BRNO_C = C.VALT_BRNO_C ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET X.TGT_YN = C.TGT_YN , X.DR_DT = C.DR_DT , X.DR_TIME = C.DR_TIME , X.DR_OP_JKW_NO = C.DR_OP_JKW_NO WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( VALT_YYMM ,CNTL_CATG_C ,CNTL_ELMN_C ,VALT_BRNO_C ,TGT_YN ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( C.VALT_YYMM , C.CNTL_CATG_C , C.CNTL_ELMN_C , C.VALT_BRNO_C , C.TGT_YN , C.DR_DT , C.DR_TIME , C.DR_OP_JKW_NO )
mapper.select: SELECT ATTCH_FILE_NO, FILE_SER, DATA_G, FILE_POS, LOSC_FILE_NM, PHSC_FILE_NM, FILE_SIZE, DOWNLOAD_CNT, DR_OP_JKW_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM, DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE WHERE ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NULL) AS CNT, T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER, T01.DATA_G, T01.FILE_POS, T01.LOSC_FILE_NM, T01.PHSC_FILE_NM, T01.FILE_SIZE, T01.DOWNLOAD_CNT, T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM, T01.DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE T01 , SRBA2_ML_EXP_I T02 WHERE T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO = T02.ATTCH_FILE_NO AND T02.SNO = #{SNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER
mapper.update: DELETE FROM SRBA2_ML_EXP_I WHERE IN_DT = #{IN_DT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SNO = #{SNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NULL) AS CNT, T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER, T01.DATA_G, T01.FILE_POS, T01.LOSC_FILE_NM, T01.PHSC_FILE_NM, T01.FILE_SIZE, T01.DOWNLOAD_CNT, T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM, T01.DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE T01 , SRBA2_ML_EXP_I T02 WHERE T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO = T02.ATTCH_FILE_NO AND T02.SNO = #{SNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER
mapper.update: DELETE FROM SRBA2_ML_EXP_I WHERE IN_DT = #{IN_DT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SNO = #{SNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(SNO),0)+1 AS SNO FROM SRBA2_ML_EXP_I
SELECT RBA_ATTCH_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS SEQ FROM DUAL
mapper.update: UPDATE SRBA2_ML_EXP_I SET ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE SNO = #{SNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
DELETE FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE /* RBA_첨부파일 */ WHERE ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select: SELECT RBA_ATTCH_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS SEQ FROM DUAL

SELECT C.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID /* 다음 ROLE_ID */ , C.RTN_ROLE_ID /* 반려ROLE_ID */ FROM C_GYLJ_M B , C_GYLJ_D C WHERE 1=1 AND B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = C.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND C.GYLJ_ROLE_ID= #{ROLE_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT SRBA2_GYLJ_H_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS MAX_GYLJ_ID FROM DUAL

SELECT A.GYLJ_ID AS GYLJ_ID /* 결재ID */ , A.GYLJ_SER AS GYLJ_SER /* 결재일련번호 */ , (SELECT ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE WHERE ROLE_ID = A.ROLE_ID) AS ROLE_NM /* 결재단계 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R325' AND DTL_C = A.GYLJ_S_C) AS GYLJ_S_C_NM /* 결재상태 */ , A.GYLJ_DT AS GYLJ_DT /* 결재일자 */ , (SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = A.GYLJ_JKW_NO) AS HNDL_JKW_NM /* 처리자 */ , (SELECT E.DPRT_NM FROM C_USER D , C_DEP_INFO F , NIC41B E WHERE D.DEP_ID = F.DEP_ID AND F.DEP_DESC = E.DPRT_CD AND D.LOGIN_ID = A.GYLJ_JKW_NO) AS HNDL_DEP_NM /* 처리지점 */ , A.NOTE_CTNT AS NOTE_CTNT /* 사유 */ , CONCAT(A.DR_DT,A.DR_TIME) AS HNDL_DY_TM /* 처리일시 */ FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_H A /* RBA 결재이력 */ WHERE 1=1 AND A.GYLJ_ID = #{GYLJ_ID, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY A.GYLJ_SER

SELECT /*+ PARALLEL (T1,4) */ T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT|| '-' || T1.SSPS_DL_ID AS SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_A , NVL(TRIM(T2.CS_NM), T2.ENG_CS_NM) AS DL_P_NM , CASE WHEN LENGTH(T1.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID) = 13 THEN SUBSTR(T1.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID,1,6)|| '-'|| SUBSTR(T1.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID,7,7) WHEN LENGTH(T1.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID) = 10 THEN SUBSTR(T1.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID,1,3)|| '-'|| SUBSTR(T1.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID,4,2)|| '-'|| SUBSTR(T1.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID,6,5) ELSE T1.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID END AS DL_P_AML_CUST_ID_VIEW , C1.CD_NM AS DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD_NM , NVL(C2.SCNR_NM, '임의 보고') AS SSPS_TYP_NM , T3.RSK_GRD_CD AS RSK_GRD_CD , C3.CD_NM AS RSK_GRD_CD_NM , T1.RSK_MRK AS RSK_MRK , T1.RSK_GRD_CD AS RSK_GRD , C4.CD_NM AS RSK_GRD_NM , T1.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID , T1.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID AS AML_CUST_ID_HIDDEN , CASE WHEN SSPS_TYP_CD IN ('A011','A012') THEN T6.CSH ELSE T6.DL_AMT END AS DL_AMT , CASE WHEN T1.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '2' THEN D.ACT_NAME ELSE C5.CD_NM END AS ACT_NAME , C6.CD_NM AS OK_CCD_NM , T1.XCL_RSN_CNTNT , T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , T1.SSPS_DL_ID , T1.INST_ID , T4.MN_DL_BRN_NM AS MN_DL_BRN_NM -- 처리점 , T4.MN_DL_BRN_CD AS MN_DL_BRN_CD -- 처리점 , T6.GNL_AC_NO AS GNL_AC_NO -- 계좌번호 , T7.CNT , T8.MAX_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AS RPR_DT -- 최근 보고일자 , T2.LG_AMT_ASTS_F -- 고액자산가여부
, CASE WHEN TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') < 10 THEN '1' ELSE '2' END AS REPORTDATE
, T1.SSPS_TYP_CD , T1.SCNR_MRK , T1.DNY_RSN_CNTNT , TO_CHAR(T1.RPR_COMPLITE_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS RPR_COMPLITE_DT , (CASE WHEN T1.DNY_RSN_CNTNT = '' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS DNY_RSN_YN , C7.CD_NM AS CS_TYP_CD_NM , T6.MIN_DL_DT AS MIN_DL_DT -- 최초거래일자 , (CASE WHEN T2.LG_AMT_ASTS_F = '1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS LG_AMT_ASTS_F_YN -- 고액자산가여부 , '' AS FIU_RPT_TYPE_C
, '' AS FIU_SEND_PRBL_C
, CASE WHEN D.WORK_STATUS_CD IN ('READY','ACTIVE') THEN C10.DISPLAY_NM ELSE C11.DISPLAY_NM END AS SN_PRC_CCD_NM , (CASE WHEN T1.XCL_RSN_CNTNT = '' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS XCL_RSN_CNTNT_YN , '' AS THEMAMTRTARGET
, I.SND_RCPT_DOC_NO , I.FIU_REG_DT FROM NIC66B T1 INNER JOIN NIC01B T2 ON T1.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID = T2.AML_CUST_ID AND T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('KYC') LEFT JOIN NIC35B T3 ON T1.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID = T3.AML_CUST_ID INNER JOIN ( SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, MN_DL_BRN_CD, MN_DL_BRN_NM FROM NIC73B GROUP BY SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, MN_DL_BRN_CD, MN_DL_BRN_NM ) T4 ON T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T4.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = T4.SSPS_DL_ID INNER JOIN NIC70B T5 ON T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T5.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID = T5.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID INNER JOIN (SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, SUM(DL_AMT) AS DL_AMT , SUM(CSH) AS CSH , GNL_AC_NO , MIN(DL_DT) AS MIN_DL_DT FROM NIC75B GROUP BY SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, GNL_AC_NO ) T6 ON T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T6.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = T6.SSPS_DL_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, DL_P_AML_CUST_ID, CNT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, DL_P_AML_CUST_ID ORDER BY CNT DESC ) RNO FROM ( SELECT /*+ PARALLEL (T11,4) */ T11.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, T11.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID, COUNT(*) OVER ( PARTITION BY T11.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID ORDER BY T11.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID ) AS CNT FROM NIC66B T11 LEFT JOIN (SELECT A.INST_ID , C.ACT_NAME FROM WF_PROC_INSTANCE A , WF_WORKLIST B , WF_ACT C WHERE A.WORK_ID = B.WORK_ID AND B.ACT_ID = C.ACT_ID ) D ON T11.INST_ID = D.INST_ID WHERE 1=1 AND T11.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD NOT IN ('CTR','CAC') AND T11.INST_ID IS NOT NULL
AND T11.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT <= #{edDate}
GROUP BY T11.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, T11.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID, T11.SSPS_DL_ID ) IT7 ) T7 ON T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T7.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID = T7.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID AND T7.RNO = 1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT DL_P_AML_CUST_ID, MAX(SSPS_DL_CRT_DT) AS MAX_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT FROM NIC66B WHERE OK_CCD ='1' AND RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '10' AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('KYC') GROUP BY DL_P_AML_CUST_ID ) T8 ON T1.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID = T8.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT INST_ID, RPR_PRGRS_CCD, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY INST_ID ORDER BY RPR_P_DY_TM DESC ) RNO FROM NIC66B_W ) T11 ON T1.INST_ID = T11.INST_ID AND T11.RNO = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.INST_ID, MAX(C.ACT_NAME) AS ACT_NAME, MAX(B.WORK_STATUS_CD) AS WORK_STATUS_CD, MAX(B.WORK_ID) AS WORK_ID FROM WF_PROC_INSTANCE A , WF_WORKLIST B , WF_ACT C , V_WF_STANDBY D WHERE A.WORK_ID = B.WORK_ID AND B.ACT_ID = C.ACT_ID AND A.INST_ID = D.INST_ID GROUP BY A.INST_ID ) D ON T1.INST_ID = D.INST_ID LEFT JOIN NIC80B I ON T1.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T1.SSPS_DL_ID = I.SSPS_DL_ID AND I.FIU_REG_DT BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate} LEFT JOIN NIC92B C1 ON T2.RNM_CNFR_CCD = C1.CNTNT AND C1.CD = 'M002' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SCNR_ID, SCNR_NM FROM TMS_APPL ) C2 ON T1.SSPS_TYP_CD = C2.SCNR_ID LEFT JOIN NIC92B C3 ON T3.RSK_GRD_CD = C3.CNTNT AND C3.CD = 'A004' LEFT JOIN NIC92B C4 ON T1.RSK_GRD_CD = C4.CNTNT AND C4.CD = 'A004' LEFT JOIN NIC92B C5 ON T1.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = C5.CNTNT AND C5.CD = 'A029' LEFT JOIN NIC92B C6 ON NVL(T1.OK_CCD, '0') = C6.CNTNT AND C6.CD = 'A301' LEFT JOIN NIC92B C7 ON T2.CS_TYP_CD = C7.CNTNT AND C7.CD = 'M012'
LEFT JOIN C_CD_NM C10 ON C10.CD_ID = 'I' AND C10.LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' LEFT JOIN C_CD_NM C11 ON T11.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = C11.CD_ID AND C11.LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' WHERE 1=1

SELECT NVL(D.GYLJ_ID, 0) AS GYLJ_ID /* 결재ID */ , NVL(D.GYLJ_S_C, 0) AS GYLJ_S_C , E.DTL_C_NM AS GYLJ_S_C_NM /* 승인상태 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(D.GYLJ_S_C, 0) = '3' THEN 'Y' /* 결재상태코드(W014) = 3(완료) */ ELSE 'N' END FINL_GYLJ_S /* 최종승인여부 */ , NVL(( SELECT NVL(H.ROLE_ID, 0) AS ROLE_ID FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_H H WHERE H.GYLJ_ID = D.GYLJ_ID AND H.GYLJ_SER = ( SELECT MAX(GYLJ_SER) FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_H WHERE GYLJ_ID = D.GYLJ_ID ) ) , 0) AS GYLJ_ROLE_ID , NVL(D.GYLJ_ROLE_ID , 0) AS NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID , (SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SNO = (SELECT MIN(SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) AS FIRST_GYLJ , (SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AND SNO = (SELECT MAX(SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )) AS END_GYLJ FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_M D LEFT JOIN SRBA2_DTL_C E /* RBA 상세 코드 정보 */ ON E.GRP_C = 'R512' /* 결재상태코드 */ AND NVL(D.GYLJ_S_C, 0) = E.DTL_C /* 결재상태코드 */ WHERE 1 = 1 AND D.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 평가일자 */ AND D.GYLJ_RQST_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*결제션구분코드*/

SELECT B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C /* 결재선구분코드 */ , A.GYLJ_LINE_NM /* 결재선명 */ , B.SNO /* 순번 */ , B.GYLJ_ROLE_ID /* 결재ROLE_ID */ , C.ROLE_NM AS GYLJ_ROLE_NM , B.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID /* 다음결재ROLE_ID */ , D.ROLE_NM AS NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_NM , B.RTN_ROLE_ID /* 반려ROLE_ID */ , E.ROLE_NM AS RTN_ROLE_NM FROM C_GYLJ_M A LEFT JOIN C_GYLJ_D B ON A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C LEFT JOIN C_ROLE C ON B.GYLJ_ROLE_ID = C.ROLE_ID LEFT JOIN C_ROLE D ON B.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID = D.ROLE_ID LEFT JOIN C_ROLE E ON B.RTN_ROLE_ID = E.ROLE_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AND B.GYLJ_ROLE_ID = #{GYLJ_ROLE_ID} AND A.USYN = 1
SELECT LPAD(SRBA2_GYLJ_H_SEQ.NEXTVAL, 9, '0') AS MAX_GYLJ_ID FROM DUAL
SELECT * FROM SRBA_KRI_SCOR_I WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT DISTINCT NVL(GYLJ_S_C,'ZERO') AS GYLJ_S_C FROM SRBA_KRI_IMPV_I WHERE BAS_YYMM LIKE CONCAT(SUBSTR( #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , 0, 4 ), '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SRBA_KRI_IMPV_I WHERE BAS_YYMM LIKE CONCAT(SUBSTR( #{COPY_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , 0, 4 ), '%')
SELECT TGT_TRN_SDT , TGT_TRN_EDT FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'A01'

SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(VALT_SDT,'') = '' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS START_YN , CASE WHEN NVL(VALT_EDT,'') = '' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS END_YN FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D WHERE 1=1 AND VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RBA_VALT_LGDV_C = 'C' AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'C01'
