SELECT A.GYLJ_ID /* 결재ID */ , A.GYLJ_SER /* 결재일련번호 */ , A.ROLE_ID /* ROLE_ID */ , B.ROLE_NM /* ROLE_ID명 */ , A.GYLJ_S_C /* 결재상태코드 */ , C.DTL_C_NM AS GYLJ_S_C_NM /* 결재상태코드명 */ , A.GYLJ_G_C /* 결재구분코드 */ , A.GYLJ_JKW_NO /* 등록조작자번호 */ , D.USER_NM /* 처리자명 */ , E.DEP_TITLE /* 처리지점 */ , A.NOTE_CTNT /* 비고내용 */ , TO_DATE(A.DR_DT || A.DR_TIME, 'YYYYMMDD HH24MISS') AS GYLJ_DT /* 결재일자 */ , A.DR_DT /* 등록일자 */ , A.DR_TIME /* 등록시간 */ , A.DR_OP_JKW_NO /* 등록조작자번호 */ FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_H A /* RBA 결재이력 */ LEFT JOIN C_ROLE B /* 사용자 권한 ROLE_ID마스터 */ ON A.ROLE_ID = B.ROLE_ID /* */ LEFT JOIN SRBA2_DTL_C C /* RBA 상세 코드 정 */ ON A.GYLJ_S_C = C.DTL_C /* 결재상태코드 */ AND C.GRP_C = 'R512' /* 그룹코드값 */ LEFT JOIN C_USER D /* AML 사용자 */ ON A.GYLJ_JKW_NO = D.LOGIN_ID /* 등록조작자번호 */ LEFT JOIN C_DEP_INFO E /* AML 부점 */ ON E.DEP_ID = D.DEP_ID /* 부점코드 */ WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.GYLJ_ID = #{GYLJ_ID} /* 결재ID */ ORDER BY A.GYLJ_SER DESC /* 결재일련번호 */

SELECT VALT_YYMM , COUNT(*) CNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRBA2_CNTL_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) TOT_CNT FROM SRBA2_CNTL_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND FIX_YN = 1 AND GYLJ_S_C = 3 GROUP BY VALT_YYMM

SELECT NVL(D.GYLJ_ID, 0) AS GYLJ_ID /* 결재ID */ , NVL(D.GYLJ_S_C, 0) AS GYLJ_S_C , E.DTL_C_NM AS GYLJ_S_C_NM /* 승인상태 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(D.GYLJ_S_C, 0) = '3' THEN 'Y' /* 결재상태코드(W014) = 3(완료) */ ELSE 'N' END FINL_GYLJ_S /* 최종승인여부 */ , NVL(( SELECT NVL(H.ROLE_ID, 0) AS ROLE_ID FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_H H WHERE H.GYLJ_ID = D.GYLJ_ID AND H.GYLJ_SER = ( SELECT MAX(GYLJ_SER) FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_H WHERE GYLJ_ID = D.GYLJ_ID ) ) , 0) AS GYLJ_ROLE_ID , NVL(D.GYLJ_ROLE_ID , 0) AS NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID ,(SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SNO = (SELECT MIN(SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) AS FIRST_GYLJ ,(SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SNO = (SELECT MAX(SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) AS END_GYLJ FROM SRBA2_CNTL_I D LEFT JOIN SRBA2_DTL_C E /* RBA 상세 코드 정보 */ ON E.GRP_C = 'R512' /* 결재상태코드 */ AND NVL(D.GYLJ_S_C, 0) = E.DTL_C /* 결재상태코드 */ WHERE 1 = 1 AND D.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 평가일자 */ AND D.VALT_BRNO_C = #{VALT_BRNO_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT A.VALT_YYMM , COUNT(*) CNT , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM SRBA2_CNTL_I A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT VALT_YYMM /*평가일자*/ , CNTL_CATG_C /*통제범주*/ , CNTL_ELMN_C /*통제요소*/ , VALT_BRNO_C /* 부서코드*/ , COUNT(*) AS BRNO_TOCNT /*전체점검수*/ , SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(NORM_YN,'') = '' THEN 0 ELSE NORM_YN END ) AS BRNO_VCNT /*점검수*/ , ROUND(SUM( CASE WHEN NORM_YN = 1 THEN WEIGHT ELSE 0 END ),2) AS CNTL_EFFECT_SCORE FROM SRBA2_CNTL_ITEM_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY VALT_YYMM , CNTL_CATG_C , CNTL_ELMN_C , VALT_BRNO_C ) B ON A.VALT_YYMM = B.VALT_YYMM AND A.CNTL_CATG_C = B.CNTL_CATG_C AND A.CNTL_ELMN_C = B.CNTL_ELMN_C AND A.VALT_BRNO_C = B.VALT_BRNO_C WHERE A.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.CNTL_EFFECT_SCORE < 99 /* (99.9도 만점...) 만점이 아닌 통제활동 건은 개선등록 목록에 포함 */ ) TOT_CNT FROM SRBA2_CNTL_RECOVER_PLAN A INNER JOIN SRBA2_GYLJ_M B ON A.VALT_YYMM = B.VALT_YYMM AND A.GYLJ_ID = B.GYLJ_ID WHERE A.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.FIX_YN = 'Y' /* Y:확정 */ AND B.GYLJ_S_C = 3 /* 3:결재완료 */ GROUP BY A.VALT_YYMM

SELECT NVL(B.GYLJ_ID, 0) AS GYLJ_ID /* 결재ID */ , NVL(B.GYLJ_S_C, 0) AS GYLJ_S_C , E.DTL_C_NM AS GYLJ_S_C_NM /* 승인상태 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(B.GYLJ_S_C, 0) = '3' THEN 'Y' /* 결재상태코드(W014) = 3(완료) */ ELSE 'N' END FINL_GYLJ_S /* 최종승인여부 */ , NVL(( SELECT NVL(H.ROLE_ID, 0) AS ROLE_ID FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_H H WHERE H.GYLJ_ID = B.GYLJ_ID AND H.GYLJ_SER = ( SELECT MAX(GYLJ_SER) FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_H WHERE GYLJ_ID = B.GYLJ_ID ) ) , 0) AS GYLJ_ROLE_ID , (SELECT CASE WHEN B.GYLJ_S_C = '2' THEN IB.RTN_ROLE_ID ELSE IB.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID END FROM C_GYLJ_M IA INNER JOIN C_GYLJ_D IB ON IA.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = IB.GYLJ_LINE_G_C AND IA.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE 1=1 AND IB.GYLJ_ROLE_ID = (SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_M WHERE GYLJ_ID = A.GYLJ_ID ) ) AS NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID ,(SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SNO = (SELECT MIN(SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) AS FIRST_GYLJ ,(SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SNO = (SELECT MAX(SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ) AS END_GYLJ FROM SRBA2_CNTL_RECOVER_PLAN A LEFT JOIN SRBA2_GYLJ_M B ON A.VALT_YYMM = B.VALT_YYMM AND A.GYLJ_ID = B.GYLJ_ID LEFT JOIN SRBA2_DTL_C E /* RBA 상세 코드 정보 */ ON E.GRP_C = 'R512' /* 결재상태코드 */ AND NVL(B.GYLJ_S_C, 0) = E.DTL_C /* 결재상태코드 */ WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_BRNO_C = #{VALT_BRNO_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT ROLE_ID AS CODE ,ROLE_NM AS NAME FROM C_ROLE WHERE ROLE_ID IN (3 ,4 , 5 ,6)

SELECT BAS_YYMM AS CODE , CONCAT(BAS_YYMM, '월') AS NAME FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT BAS_YYMM AS BAS_YYMM FROM SRBA_BIZRPT_D_M WHERE BAS_YYMM IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(BAS_YYMM)) != 0 ) A ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC
SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTR(BAS_YYMM,0,4) AS CODE , CONCAT(SUBSTR(BAS_YYMM,0,4), '년') AS NAME FROM SRBA_KRI_SCOR_I WHERE BAS_YYMM IS NOT NULL AND BAS_YYMM != 999912 ORDER BY SUBSTR(BAS_YYMM,0,4) DESC
SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTR(BAS_YYMM,0,4) AS CODE , CONCAT(SUBSTR(BAS_YYMM,0,4), '년') AS NAME FROM SRBA_KRI_SCOR_I WHERE BAS_YYMM IS NOT NULL AND BAS_YYMM != 999912 ORDER BY BAS_YYMM DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.VALT_BRNO_C, A.CNTL_CATG_C, A.CNTL_ELMN_C) AS CNT , A.CNTL_CATG_C /*통제범주 */ , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.CNTL_CATG_C AND GRP_C ='R504' ) CNTL_CATG_NM , A.CNTL_ELMN_C /*통제요소 */ , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.CNTL_ELMN_C AND GRP_C ='R505' ) CNTL_ELMN_NM , A.VALT_BRNO_C /* 부서코드*/ , ( SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = A.VALT_BRNO_C ) VALT_BRNO_NM , A.GYLJ_S_C /*진행상태 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(A.GYLJ_S_C,0) IN ('1','2','4') THEN '진행중' WHEN NVL(A.GYLJ_S_C,'') = '' OR NVL(A.GYLJ_S_C,0) = 0 THEN '미진행' ELSE ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.GYLJ_S_C AND GRP_C ='R512' ) END AS GYLJ_NM , B.BRNO_TOCNT /* 전체점검수 */ , B.BRNO_VCNT /* 평가항목수 */ , CASE WHEN B.BRNO_TOCNT = B.BRNO_VCNT THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS BRNO_RESULT /* 평가결과 */ , CONCAT((B.BRNO_VCNT/NVL(B.BRNO_TOCNT,1))*100, '%') AS VAL_PER /* 평가진행률 */ , A.FIX_YN , A.GYLJ_ID , NVL((SELECT * FROM (SELECT GYLJ_RQST_G_C FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_M WHERE GYLJ_ID = A.GYLJ_ID AND VALT_YYMM = A.VALT_YYMM) WHERE ROWNUM = 1), '') AS GYLJ_LINE_G_C , A.GYLJ_DT , A.GYLJ_JKW_NO , A.GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM SRBA2_CNTL_I A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CNTL_CATG_C /*통제범주*/ , CNTL_ELMN_C /*통제요소*/ , VALT_BRNO_C /* 부서코드*/ /* , COUNT(*) AS BRNO_TOCNT 전체점검수*/ , SUM(CASE WHEN USE_YN = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS BRNO_TOCNT /*전체점검수*/ , SUM(CASE WHEN NORM_YN IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) AS BRNO_VCNT /*점검수*/ FROM SRBA2_CNTL_ITEM_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY CNTL_CATG_C , CNTL_ELMN_C , VALT_BRNO_C ) B ON A.CNTL_CATG_C = B.CNTL_CATG_C AND A.CNTL_ELMN_C = B.CNTL_ELMN_C AND A.VALT_BRNO_C = B.VALT_BRNO_C WHERE A.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND A.VALT_BRNO_C = #{VALT_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT NVL(D.GYLJ_ID, 0) AS GYLJ_ID /* 결재ID */ , NVL(D.GYLJ_S_C, 0) AS GYLJ_S_C , E.DTL_C_NM AS GYLJ_S_C_NM /* 승인상태 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(D.GYLJ_S_C, 0) = '3' THEN 'Y' /* 결재상태코드() = (완료) */ ELSE 'N' END FINL_GYLJ_S /* 최종승인여부 */ , NVL(( SELECT NVL(H.ROLE_ID, 0) AS ROLE_ID FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_H H WHERE H.GYLJ_ID = D.GYLJ_ID AND H.GYLJ_SER = ( SELECT MAX(GYLJ_SER) FROM SRBA2_GYLJ_H WHERE GYLJ_ID = D.GYLJ_ID ) ) , 0) AS GYLJ_ROLE_ID , NVL(D.GYLJ_ROLE_ID , 0) AS NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID ,(SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'W013' AND SNO = (SELECT MIN(SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'W013' ) ) AS FIRST_GYLJ ,(SELECT GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'W013' AND SNO = (SELECT MAX(SNO) FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = 'W013' )) AS END_GYLJ FROM SRBA2_CNTL_I D --통제내역 LEFT JOIN SRBA2_DTL_C E /* RBA 상세 코드 정보 */ ON E.GRP_C = 'R512' /* 평가결제코드 */ AND NVL(D.GYLJ_S_C, 0) = E.DTL_C /* 결재상태코드 */ WHERE 1 = 1
SELECT NVL(REAL_EDT,'0') AS REAL_EDT FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'B02'

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.VALT_YYMM ) AS CNT , A.CNTL_CATG_C /*통제범주 */ , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.CNTL_CATG_C AND GRP_C ='R504' ) CNTL_CATG_NM , A.CNTL_ELMN_C /*통제요소 */ , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.CNTL_ELMN_C AND GRP_C ='R505' ) CNTL_ELMN_NM , A.VALT_BRNO_C /* 부서코드*/ , ( SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = A.VALT_BRNO_C ) VALT_BRNO_NM , B.ISPT_ITEM_CTNT /*점검항목내용*/ , A.TONGJE_ISP_STEP /*통제점검절차내용*/ , 'Y' AS SAM_DTL , NVL(A.ORI_NORM_YN ,A.NORM_YN) AS ORI_NORM_YN , CASE WHEN NVL(TO_CHAR(A.NORM_YN),'') = '' THEN '' ELSE TO_CHAR(A.NORM_YN) END AS NORM_YN , A.SNO , B.TONGJE_TP_C /*통제유형코드*/ , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = B.TONGJE_TP_C AND GRP_C ='R506' ) TONGJE_TP_C_NM FROM SRBA2_CNTL_ITEM_I A /*RBA_평가_통제점검항목 */ INNER JOIN SRBA2_CNTL_ITEM_D B ON A.VALT_YYMM = B.VALT_YYMM AND A.CNTL_CATG_C = B.CNTL_CATG_C AND A.CNTL_ELMN_C = B.CNTL_ELMN_C AND A.SNO = B.SNO WHERE A.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CNTL_CATG_C = #{CNTL_CATG_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CNTL_ELMN_C = #{CNTL_ELMN_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_BRNO_C = #{VALT_BRNO_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.USE_YN=1

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.VALT_BRNO_C, A.CNTL_CATG_C, A.CNTL_ELMN_C) AS CNT , A.CNTL_CATG_C /*통제범주 */ , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.CNTL_CATG_C AND GRP_C ='R504' ) CNTL_CATG_NM , A.CNTL_ELMN_C /*통제요소 */ , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.CNTL_ELMN_C AND GRP_C ='R505' ) CNTL_ELMN_NM , A.VALT_BRNO_C /* 부서코드*/ , ( SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = A.VALT_BRNO_C ) VALT_BRNO_NM , CASE WHEN B.BRNO_TOCNT = B.Y_BRNO_VCNT THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS BRNO_RESULT , B.BRNO_TOCNT /*전체점검수 */ , B.Y_BRNO_VCNT /*Y항목수 */ , B.N_BRNO_VCNT /*Y항목수 */ , SUBSTR(A.DR_DT,1,4) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.DR_DT,5,2) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.DR_DT,7,2) AS DR_DT /*등록일자*/ , SUBSTR(A.GYLJ_DT,1,4) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.GYLJ_DT,5,2) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.GYLJ_DT,7,2) AS GYLJ_DT /*결제일자*/ , CASE WHEN A.GYLJ_S_C = '' OR A.GYLJ_S_C IS null OR A.GYLJ_S_C = 0 THEN '미처리' WHEN A.GYLJ_S_C ='1' THEN '진행중' WHEN A.GYLJ_S_C ='2' THEN '반려' WHEN A.GYLJ_S_C ='3' THEN '완료' END GYLJ_S_C /*진행상태 */ , A.FIX_YN , A.GYLJ_ID , A.GYLJ_DT , A.GYLJ_JKW_NO , A.GYLJ_ROLE_ID FROM SRBA2_CNTL_I A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CNTL_CATG_C /* 통제범주 */ , CNTL_ELMN_C /* 통제요소 */ , VALT_BRNO_C /* 부서코드 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN USE_YN = 1 THEN 1 END ) AS BRNO_TOCNT /* 전체점검수 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN NORM_YN =1 THEN 1 END ) AS Y_BRNO_VCNT /* Y 평가수 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN NORM_YN =0 THEN 1 END ) AS N_BRNO_VCNT /* N 평가수 */ FROM SRBA2_CNTL_ITEM_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY CNTL_CATG_C , CNTL_ELMN_C , VALT_BRNO_C ) B ON A.CNTL_CATG_C = B.CNTL_CATG_C AND A.CNTL_ELMN_C = B.CNTL_ELMN_C AND A.VALT_BRNO_C = B.VALT_BRNO_C WHERE A.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND A.VALT_BRNO_C = #{VALT_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() over (order by T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER) AS CNT, T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER, T01.DATA_G, T01.FILE_POS, T01.LOSC_FILE_NM, T01.PHSC_FILE_NM, T01.FILE_SIZE, T01.DOWNLOAD_CNT, T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM, T01.DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE T01 , SRBA2_CNTL_ATTCH_I T02 WHERE T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO = T02.ATTCH_FILE_NO AND T02.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER
mapper.update: INSERT INTO SRBA2_CNTL_ATTCH_I ( VALT_YYMM , ATTCH_FILE_NO , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
DELETE FROM SRBA2_CNTL_ATTCH_I WHERE ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NULL) AS CNT , A.CNTL_CATG_C /*통제범주 */ , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.CNTL_CATG_C AND GRP_C ='R504' ) CNTL_CATG_NM , A.CNTL_ELMN_C /*통제요소 */ , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.CNTL_ELMN_C AND GRP_C ='R505' ) CNTL_ELMN_NM , A.VALT_BRNO_C /* 부서코드*/ , ( SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = A.VALT_BRNO_C ) VALT_BRNO_NM , B.ISPT_ITEM_CTNT /*점검항목내용*/ , A.TONGJE_ISP_STEP /*통제점검절차내용*/ , 'Y' as SAM_DTL , A.CHG_RSN_CTNT , NVL(A.ORI_NORM_YN ,A.NORM_YN) AS ORI_NORM_YN , A.NORM_YN /*정상여부*/ , A.SNO , B.TONGJE_TP_C /*통제유형코드*/ , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = B.TONGJE_TP_C AND GRP_C ='R506' ) TONGJE_TP_C_NM FROM SRBA2_CNTL_ITEM_I A /*RBA_평가_통제점검항목 */ , SRBA2_CNTL_ITEM_D B WHERE A.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CNTL_CATG_C = #{CNTL_CATG_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CNTL_ELMN_C = #{CNTL_ELMN_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_BRNO_C = #{VALT_BRNO_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_YYMM = B.VALT_YYMM AND A.CNTL_CATG_C = B.CNTL_CATG_C AND A.CNTL_ELMN_C = B.CNTL_ELMN_C AND A.SNO = B.SNO AND A.USE_YN = 1

SELECT ROWNUM CNT , A.CNTL_CATG_C /*통제범주 */ , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.CNTL_CATG_C AND GRP_C ='R504' ) CNTL_CATG_NM , A.CNTL_ELMN_C /*통제요소 */ , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.CNTL_ELMN_C AND GRP_C ='R505' ) CNTL_ELMN_NM , A.VALT_BRNO_C /* 부서코드*/ , ( SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = A.VALT_BRNO_C ) VALT_BRNO_NM , B.ISPT_ITEM_CTNT /*점검항목내용*/ , A.SNO , CASE WHEN A.NORM_YN = 1 THEN 'Y' WHEN A.NORM_YN = 0 THEN 'N' END NORM_YN FROM SRBA2_CNTL_ITEM_I A /*RBA_평가_통제점검항목 */ , SRBA2_CNTL_ITEM_D B WHERE A.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_YYMM = B.VALT_YYMM AND A.CNTL_CATG_C = B.CNTL_CATG_C AND A.CNTL_ELMN_C = B.CNTL_ELMN_C AND A.SNO = B.SNO AND A.USE_YN = 1

SELECT RSK_CATG_NM , RSK_ELMT_DTL_CTNT , EXT_CNT , KRI_ALERT_YN , HALF , BEF_EXT_CNT , BEF_KRI_ALERT_YN , BEF_HALF , BASE.VALT_YYMM AS VALT_YYMM , BASE.RSK_CATG_C AS RSK_CATG_C , BASE.RSK_CATG_C_NM AS RSK_CATG_C_NM , BASE.RSK_ELMT_C_NM AS RSK_ELMT_C_NM , BASE.RSK_ELMT_C AS RSK_ELMT_C , BASE.RSK_WEGHT AS RSK_WEGHT , BASE.WLF_YN AS WLF_YN , BASE.H_RSK_YN AS H_RSK_YN , BASE.RSK_ELMNT_C_NM AS RSK_ELMNT_C_NM FROM (SELECT #{VALT_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS VALT_YYMM , RSK_ELMT_C , RSK_CATG_NM , RSK_ELMT_DTL_CTNT , SUM(EXT_CNT) AS EXT_CNT , CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN KRI_ALERT_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'O' ELSE 'X' END AS KRI_ALERT_YN , MAX(HALF) AS HALF FROM (SELECT VALT_YYMM , RSK_ELMT_C , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R502' AND USYN = 1 AND DTL_C = RSK_CATG_C ) AS RSK_CATG_NM , RSK_ELMT_DTL_CTNT , EXT_CNT , KRI_ALERT_YN , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(VALT_YYMM, 6, 1) BETWEEN '2' AND '7' THEN '상반기' ELSE '하반기' END AS HALF FROM SRBA2_KRI_RSLT
WHERE VALT_YYMM BETWEEN TO_CHAR(CAST(#{VALT_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS INT) * 100 + 2) AND TO_CHAR(CAST(#{VALT_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS INT) * 100 + 7)
WHERE VALT_YYMM BETWEEN TO_CHAR(CAST(#{VALT_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS INT) * 100 + 8) AND TO_CHAR((CAST(#{VALT_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS INT) + 1) * 100 + 1)
) A WHERE HALF = #{HALF, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY RSK_ELMT_C , RSK_CATG_NM , RSK_ELMT_DTL_CTNT ) SEL LEFT JOIN (SELECT RSK_ELMT_C , SUM(EXT_CNT) AS BEF_EXT_CNT , CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN KRI_ALERT_YN ='Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'O' ELSE 'X' END AS BEF_KRI_ALERT_YN , MAX(HALF) AS BEF_HALF FROM (SELECT VALT_YYMM , RSK_ELMT_C , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R502' AND USYN = 1 AND DTL_C = RSK_CATG_C ) AS RSK_CATG_NM , RSK_ELMT_DTL_CTNT , EXT_CNT , KRI_ALERT_YN , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(VALT_YYMM, 6, 1) BETWEEN '2' AND '7' THEN '상반기' ELSE '하반기' END AS HALF FROM SRBA2_KRI_RSLT
WHERE VALT_YYMM BETWEEN TO_CHAR((CAST(#{VALT_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS INT) - 1) * 100 + 8) AND TO_CHAR(CAST(#{VALT_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS INT) * 100 + 1)
WHERE VALT_YYMM BETWEEN TO_CHAR(CAST(#{VALT_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS INT) * 100 + 2) AND TO_CHAR(CAST(#{VALT_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS INT) * 100 + 7)
) A
WHERE HALF = '하반기'
WHERE HALF = '상반기'
GROUP BY RSK_ELMT_C ) BEF ON SEL.RSK_ELMT_C = BEF.RSK_ELMT_C LEFT JOIN (SELECT VALT_YYMM , RSK_CATG_C , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE GRP_C = 'R502' AND DTL_C = RSK_CATG_C ) AS RSK_CATG_C_NM , (SELECT DTL_C_NM AS NAME FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE USYN = 1 AND GRP_C='R503' AND DTL_C= RSK_ELMT_C ) AS RSK_ELMT_C_NM , RSK_ELMT_C , RSK_WEGHT , WLF_YN , H_RSK_YN , RSK_ELMT_DTL_CTNT AS RSK_ELMNT_C_NM FROM SRBA2_RISK_ELMT_M WHERE SUBSTR(VALT_YYMM, 1, 4) = #{VALT_YYYY, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) BASE ON SEL.RSK_ELMT_C = BASE.RSK_ELMT_C WHERE 1 = 1
AND KRI_ALERT_YN = #{KRI_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
ORDER BY RSK_ELMT_C

SELECT SUBSTR(BAS_YYMM,0,4) YYYY, SUBSTR(BAS_YYMM,5,6) MM, RSK_CATG_C , SUM(KRI_TMM_CNT) KRI_TMM_CNT FROM SRBA_KRI_SCOR_I WHERE SUBSTR(BAS_YYMM,0,4) = SUBSTR(#{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR},0,4) AND SUBSTR(BAS_YYMM,5,6) IN ('03' , '06' , '09' , '12') AND QTE_DGE != 0 GROUP BY SUBSTR(BAS_YYMM,0,4) , SUBSTR(BAS_YYMM,5,6) , RSK_CATG_C ORDER BY SUBSTR(BAS_YYMM,0,4) , SUBSTR(BAS_YYMM,5,6) , RSK_CATG_C ASC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY VALT_YYMM) AS NUM , A.RSK_CATG_C AS RSK_CATG_C /* 위험범주 */ , (SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.RSK_CATG_C AND GRP_C ='R502') AS RSK_CATG_NM , SUM(A.EXPS_RSK_PNT) AS EXPS_RSK_PNT /* 고유위험 */ , SUM(A.CNTL_EFF_RT) AS CNTL_EFF_RT /*통제효과성*/ , SUM(A.REMDR_RSK_PNT) AS REMDR_RSK_PNT /*잔여위험*/ , SUM(NVL((SELECT REMDR_RSK_PNT FROM SRBA2_RISK_RLT_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '01', 'YYYYMMDD'), -36), 'YYYY') || '12' AND RSK_CATG_C = A.RSK_CATG_C),0)) AS REMDR_RSK1 , SUM(NVL((SELECT REMDR_RSK_PNT FROM SRBA2_RISK_RLT_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '01', 'YYYYMMDD'), -24), 'YYYY') || '12' AND RSK_CATG_C = A.RSK_CATG_C),0)) AS REMDR_RSK2 , SUM(NVL((SELECT REMDR_RSK_PNT FROM SRBA2_RISK_RLT_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '01', 'YYYYMMDD'), -12), 'YYYY') || '12' AND RSK_CATG_C = A.RSK_CATG_C),0)) AS REMDR_RSK3 , SUM(NVL((SELECT REMDR_RSK_PNT FROM SRBA2_RISK_RLT_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '01', 'YYYYMMDD'), 0), 'YYYY') || '12' AND RSK_CATG_C = A.RSK_CATG_C),0)) AS REMDR_RSK4 FROM SRBA2_RISK_RLT_I A WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY VALT_YYMM , RSK_CATG_C
UNION ALL
SELECT 5 AS NUM , 'RS' AS RSK_CATG_C /* 위험범주 */ , '종합' AS RSK_CATG_NM , SUM(A.EXPS_RSK_PNT) AS EXPS_RSK_PNT /* 고유위험 */ , SUM(A.CNTL_EFF_RT) AS CNTL_EFF_RT /*통제효과성*/ , SUM(A.REMDR_RSK_PNT) AS REMDR_RSK_PNT /*잔여위험*/ , SUM(NVL((SELECT REMDR_RSK_PNT FROM SRBA2_RISK_RLT_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '01', 'YYYYMMDD'), -36), 'YYYY') || '12' AND RSK_CATG_C = A.RSK_CATG_C),0)) AS REMDR_RSK1 , SUM(NVL((SELECT REMDR_RSK_PNT FROM SRBA2_RISK_RLT_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '01', 'YYYYMMDD'), -24), 'YYYY') || '12' AND RSK_CATG_C = A.RSK_CATG_C),0)) AS REMDR_RSK2 , SUM(NVL((SELECT REMDR_RSK_PNT FROM SRBA2_RISK_RLT_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '01', 'YYYYMMDD'), -12), 'YYYY') || '12' AND RSK_CATG_C = A.RSK_CATG_C),0)) AS REMDR_RSK3 , SUM(NVL((SELECT REMDR_RSK_PNT FROM SRBA2_RISK_RLT_I WHERE VALT_YYMM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '01', 'YYYYMMDD'), 0), 'YYYY') || '12' AND RSK_CATG_C = A.RSK_CATG_C),0)) AS REMDR_RSK4 FROM SRBA2_RISK_RLT_I A WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY VALT_YYMM

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.VALT_YYMM DESC) AS CNT , B.RSK_CATG_C /* 위험범주 */ , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = B.RSK_CATG_C AND GRP_C ='R502' ) RSK_CATG_NM , B.RSK_ELMT_C /* 위험요소 */ , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = B.RSK_ELMT_C AND GRP_C ='R503' ) RSK_ELMT_NM , A.RSK_CTNT AS RSK_ELMT_DTL_NM , A.RSK_WEGHT AS WEGHT /* 가중치 */ , B.KRI_ALERT_YN AS KRI_ALERT_YN /* KRI ALERT 유무*/ , B.EXT_YN AS EXT_YN /* KYC수행고객/STR Alert 유무 */ , B.RSK_SCORE /* 요소별 점수 */ , C.CATG_RSK_PNT AS RSK_CATG_SCORE /* 범주별 점수 */ FROM SRBA2_RISK_ELMT_M A INNER JOIN SRBA2_RSK_RSLT B ON A.RSK_ELMT_C = B.RSK_ELMT_C AND A.RSK_CATG_C = B.RSK_CATG_C AND A.VALT_YYMM = B.VALT_YYMM INNER JOIN (SELECT VALT_YYMM , RSK_CATG_C , SUM(RSK_SCORE) AS CATG_RSK_PNT FROM SRBA2_RSK_RSLT WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY VALT_YYMM , RSK_CATG_C ) C ON B.VALT_YYMM = C.VALT_YYMM AND B.RSK_CATG_C = C.RSK_CATG_C WHERE A.VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND A.RSK_CATG_C = #{RSK_CATG_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT DISTINCT A.RSK_CATG_C AS CODE , ( SELECT DTL_C_NM FROM SRBA2_DTL_C WHERE DTL_C = A.RSK_CATG_C AND GRP_C ='R502' ) AS NAME FROM SRBA2_RISK_ELMT_M A WHERE VALT_YYMM = '999912' ORDER BY RSK_CATG_C
mapper.update: UPDATE SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M SET TONGJE_V_FIX_YN = #{FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- (0:진행 , 1:확정) , TONGJE_V_FIX_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') -- 확정된일자 , TONGJE_V_FIX_JKW_NO = #{FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 확정된사람 , ING_STEP = case #{FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} when '1' then '30' else '0' end , CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') -- 수정일자 , CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') -- 수정시간 , CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 수정자 WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도

UPDATE SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D SET REAL_EDT = case when #{FIX_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} = '1' then TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') else '' end , -- 실제종료일자 CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{FIX_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE VALT_YYMM = #{VALT_YYMM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} -- 기준년도 AND RBA_VALT_LGDV_C='D' AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C='D03'
mapper.select: SELECT VALT_YYMM, REAL_EDT FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_D WHERE VALT_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(VALT_YYMM) AS VALT_YYMM FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M WHERE VALT_YYMM != '999912') AND RBA_VALT_SMDV_C = 'B02'
SELECT NVL(ING_STEP,0) FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M WHERE VALT_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(VALT_YYMM) AS VALT_YYMM FROM SRBA2_VLTN_SCE_M WHERE VALT_YYMM != '999912')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.RPT_GJDT) as CNT FROM JRBA_JIPYO_V a JOIN JRBA_RPT_RST_M b ON a.RPT_GJDT = b.RPT_GJDT WHERE a.ITEM_S_C='2'
AND NVL(b.GYLJ_S_C,'999') IN ('0','22', '999')
AND NVL(b.GYLJ_S_C,999) = '12'
